35104.title: Cross-Border Product Diffusion: Migrant Networks, Consumer Imports, and Retailer Learning
35104.zh_title: 跨境产品采纳：个人进口、移民网络与国内零售商
35104.authors: David Argente, Esteban Méndez, Diana Van Patten
35104.abstract: This paper studies how new varieties enter markets and become locally available. We provide causal evidence of demand externalities that operate in two steps. First, information about new varieties diffuses directly through real-world social ties among consumers. Second, early purchases generate an indirect spillover to firms: local retailers learn from "pioneer'' consumers which new varieties are most likely to succeed and adjust their product offerings accordingly. We study this process in the context of direct-to-consumer imports. Using customs records on individuals' purchases matched to population-wide social networks, international migrant links, and retailer catchment areas, we document economically meaningful demand externalities. Product-specific demand shocks abroad transmit through migrant networks and shift which varieties consumers purchase. Leveraging these shocks as a plausibly exogenous source of local demand variation, we show strong peer effects: prior purchases by close neighbors, coworkers, or friends increase an individual’s likelihood of purchasing the same variety, especially for premium and visible goods. We leverage this result to identify an indirect spillover from consumers to firms: retailers are more likely to add a variety when it becomes popular among consumers in their catchment area. Combining the instrument with linked consumer--retailer data and a self-conducted retailer survey, we show that this response reflects learning about latent demand for varieties not yet stocked locally. Together, social diffusion and retailer learning generate demand multipliers that reshape local product availability and expand access to global variety.
35104.zh_abstract: 本文研究新产品种类如何进入市场并成为本地可获得的商品。我们提供了需求外部性的因果证据，该外部性分两步运作。首先，关于新产品种类的信息通过消费者之间的现实社会联系直接传播。其次，早期购买对企业产生间接溢出效应：本地零售商从“先驱”消费者那里了解到哪些新产品种类最有可能成功，并相应调整其产品供应。我们在直接面向消费者的进口背景下研究这一过程。利用匹配到全人口社交网络、国际移民联系和零售商辐射范围的个人购买海关记录，我们记录了具有经济意义的需求外部性。来自国外的产品特定需求冲击通过移民网络传播，并改变了消费者购买的产品种类。利用这些冲击作为看似外生的本地需求变化来源，我们展示了强大的同伴效应：邻居、同事或朋友之前的购买增加了个人购买相同种类的可能性，尤其是对于高端和可见商品。我们利用这一结果来识别从消费者到企业的间接溢出效应：当一种产品种类在其辐射范围内的消费者中变得流行时，零售商更有可能增加该种类。结合工具变量、关联的消费者-零售商数据以及自行开展的零售商调查，我们表明这种反应反映了对尚未本地库存的产品种类潜在需求的学习。社会扩散和零售商学习共同产生了需求乘数，重塑了本地产品供应并扩大了对全球产品种类的获取。

35103.title: Nudging Parents out the Door: The Impacts of Parental Encouragement on School Choice and Test Scores
35103.zh_title: 推动家长走出门外：家长鼓励对学校选择和考试成绩的影响
35103.authors: Guthrie Gray-Lobe, Michael Kremer, Joost de Laat, Oluchi Mbonu, Cole Scanlon
35103.abstract: This study evaluates a large-scale SMS outreach program to engage caregivers of students in private primary schools in Kenya. Using a two-stage randomization design, we tested two types of weekly SMS messages: growth-mindset encouragement and personalized performance information. We find two main effects: First, outreach improved test scores by 0.07 standard deviations, with particularly strong gains among initially lower-performing students. This improvement generates 12 learning-adjusted years of schooling per US$\$100$ spent—making it highly cost-effective relative to other education interventions. Second, outreach increased student exit rates by 4.7-5.0 percentage points, with effects concentrated among higher-achieving students (5.7 to 6.6 percent-age points). We develop a theoretical model of vertically differentiated schools where parental engagement affects both learning production and school choice. The model shows that when parents update their understanding of education production through engagement programs, they become more sensitive to perceived school quality differences. This increased sensitivity can lead lower-quality schools to forgo implementing engagement programs—even when costless—as enhanced parental discernment accelerates student exits. Our findings suggest a role for third-party provision of parent engagement programs in competitive education markets.
35103.zh_abstract: 本研究评估了一项针对肯尼亚私立小学学生看护人的大规模短信外联项目。使用两阶段随机化设计，我们测试了两种类型的每周短信：成长型思维鼓励和个性化表现信息。我们发现两个主要效应：首先，外联使考试成绩提高了0.07个标准差，在初始成绩较低的学生中效果尤为显著。这一改善使得每花费100美元可获得12个经学习调整的学年——相对于其他教育干预措施而言，这极具成本效益。其次，外联使学生离校率提高了4.7-5.0个百分点，其影响集中在成绩较高的学生中（5.7至6.6个百分点）。我们构建了一个垂直差异化学校的理论模型，其中家长参与既影响学习产出也影响学校选择。该模型表明，当家长通过参与项目更新对教育生产的理解时，他们对感知到的学校质量差异变得更加敏感。这种增强的敏感性可能导致质量较低的学校放弃实施参与项目——即使项目是免费的——因为家长辨别力的提高加速了学生离校。我们的研究结果表明，在竞争性教育市场中，由第三方提供家长参与项目具有一定作用。

35102.title: The Macroeconomic Effects of Tariffs: Insights from 180 Years of U.S. Trade Policy
35102.zh_title: 关税的宏观经济效应：来自美国180年贸易政策的见解
35102.authors: Tamar den Besten, Regis Barnichon, Diego R. Känzig, Aayush Singh
35102.abstract: We study the macroeconomic effects of tariff policy using U.S. historical data from 1840–2024. We construct a narrative series of plausibly exogenous tariff changes – based on major legislative actions, multilateral negotiations, and temporary surcharges – and use it as an instrument to identify a structural tariff shock. Tariff increases are contractionary: imports fall sharply, exports decline with a lag, and output and manufacturing activity drop persistently. The shock transmits through both supply and demand channels. Prices rise in the full sample but fall post-World War II, a pattern consistent with changes in the monetary policy response and with stronger international retaliation and reciprocity in the modern trade regime.
35102.zh_abstract: 我们利用1840-2024年的美国历史数据研究关税政策的宏观经济效应。我们构建了一个看似外生的关税变化叙事序列——基于重大立法行动、多边谈判和临时附加费——并将其用作工具变量来识别结构性关税冲击。关税上调是收缩性的：进口急剧下降，出口滞后下降，产出和制造业活动持续下降。冲击通过供给和需求两个渠道传导。在全样本中价格上涨，但在二战后价格下跌，这一模式与货币政策反应的变化以及现代贸易体制中更强的国际报复和互惠性相一致。
35102.meta: Programs：DAE, EFG, ITI, ME；JEL：E30, F13, F14, F41, H20

35101.title: The Political Economy of Financial Crises
35101.zh_title: 金融危机的政治经济学
35101.authors: Charles W. Calomiris, Matthew S. Jaremski
35101.abstract: Financial crises remain a recurrent feature of modern economies despite evidence that many are predictable and preventable. This chapter discusses how financial instability often reflects a political equilibrium rather than purely technocratic shortcomings. Contrasting economic and political perspectives on regulation, the chapter emphasizes how policymakers shape financial rules in ways that favor politically-influential groups but result in financial vulnerability. Key mechanisms include restricted bank chartering, safety nets, credit subsidies, and sovereign borrowing. Political forces also shape crisis management. Delayed interventions, selective support, and constrained policy responses can deepen and prolong crises. Together, these dynamics help explain the persistent and foreseeable nature of financial instability across time, legal origins, political structures, and institutional contexts. Instead of seeing financial crises as arising from an unavoidable vulnerability to external shocks they are better seen as a mirror of the societies in which they occur, reflecting their political structures, vying constituencies, cultural preferences, and blind spots.
35101.zh_abstract: 尽管有证据表明许多金融危机是可预测和可预防的，但它们仍然是现代经济中反复出现的特征。本章讨论了金融不稳定如何常常反映一种政治均衡，而非纯粹的技术性缺陷。通过对比经济学和政治学对监管的看法，本章强调了政策制定者如何以有利于政治上有影响力的群体但导致金融脆弱性的方式制定金融规则。关键机制包括限制银行特许经营、安全网、信贷补贴和主权借贷。政治力量也塑造了危机管理。延迟干预、选择性支持和受限的政策反应可能加深和延长危机。这些动态共同有助于解释金融不稳定在不同时期、法律渊源、政治结构和制度背景下的持续性和可预见性。与其将金融危机视为源于对外部冲击不可避免的脆弱性，不如将其视为其所发生社会的一面镜子，反映其政治结构、竞争的利益群体、文化偏好和盲点。
35101.meta: Programs：DAE；JEL：E44, F34, G01, H12, N1, N2, P16

35100.title: Measuring the Impact of Data Centers in the United States Economy: Monetary Damage from Air Pollution and Greenhouse Gas Emissions
35100.zh_title: 衡量数据中心对美国经济的影响：空气污染和温室气体排放的货币损害
35100.abstract: This paper quantifies the environmental externalities associated with electricity consumption by data centers in the United States, focusing on damages from local air pollution and greenhouse gas (GHG) emissions. Using facility-level data for approximately 2,800 operational data centers in 2025, combined with electricity grid characteristics and emissions data, the analysis estimates pollution impacts through the AP4 integrated assessment model and applies the social cost of carbon for GHG valuation. Results indicate that data centers consume roughly 250 TWh of electricity—about 5–6% of U.S. generation—and generate approximately $\$25$ billion in gross external damages (GED), with a range of $\$10$–$\$33$ billion. These damages are highly geographically concentrated, with Texas and Virginia accounting for 30% of the national total. While GED comprises about 5% of industry GDP, this ratio varies widely across states, exceeding GDP in some regions. Planned data center expansion could increase electricity demand and associated damages by up to 85% in the near term. Despite these environmental costs, preliminary comparisons suggest that the damages attributable to AI-related energy use are small relative to potential productivity gains.
35100.zh_abstract: 本文量化了美国数据中心电力消费相关的环境外部性，重点关注本地空气污染和温室气体排放造成的损害。利用2025年约2,800个运营数据中心的设施级数据，结合电网特征和排放数据，该分析通过AP4综合评估模型估算污染影响，并应用碳的社会成本进行温室气体估值。结果表明，数据中心消耗约250太瓦时的电力——约占美国发电量的5-6%——并产生约250亿美元的总外部损害，范围在100亿至330亿美元之间。这些损害在地理上高度集中，德克萨斯州和弗吉尼亚州占全国总量的30%。虽然总外部损害约占行业GDP的5%，但这一比例在各州之间差异很大，在某些地区甚至超过GDP。计划中的数据中心扩张可能在短期内使电力需求和相关损害增加高达85%。尽管存在这些环境成本，初步比较表明，与人工智能相关的能源使用所造成的损害相对于潜在的生产率提升而言较小。

35123.title: Understanding Firms' AI Efforts and Their Economic Impact
35123.zh_title: 理解企业的人工智能努力及其经济影响
35123.abstract: This paper reviews firm-level data on artificial intelligence and the emerging evidence on AI's economic effects. It argues that measurement is central: different AI datasets capture different objects (including invention versus use, internal capability building versus outsourcing, and realized activity versus investor perceptions) and can therefore lead to different conclusions. The paper develops a framework for choosing among these measures and surveys available data sources on firm AI efforts. It synthesizes evidence on AI's effects on firm growth, valuation, productivity, risk, labor, competition, financial markets and applications. The paper concludes by suggesting some ideas for future research.
35123.zh_abstract: 本文回顾了关于人工智能的企业层面数据以及人工智能经济影响的新兴证据。文章认为，度量是关键：不同的人工智能数据集捕捉不同的对象（包括发明与使用、内部能力建设与外包、已实现的活动与投资者的认知），因此可能导致不同的结论。本文构建了一个在这些度量方法中进行选择的框架，并调查了关于企业人工智能努力的现有数据来源。文章综合了关于人工智能对企业增长、估值、生产率、风险、劳动力、竞争、金融市场和应用影响的证据。本文最后为未来研究提出了一些建议。
35123.meta: Programs：AP, CF, EFG, LS, PR；JEL：G0, J0, M0

35122.title: Risky Insurance: Life-Cycle Insurance Portfolio Choice with Incomplete Markets
35122.zh_title: 风险保险：不完全市场下的生命周期保险组合选择
35122.authors: Joseph S. Briggs, Ciaran Rogers, Christopher Tonetti
35122.abstract: We study consumer demand for savings, life insurance, annuities, and long-term care insurance using novel survey data and a structural life-cycle model. We document that individuals perceive substantial insurance nonpayment risk, and these beliefs predict ownership. Embedding elicited beliefs into an incomplete-markets model alongside additional real-world insurance features, we match empirical patterns of low participation. Relative to a no-insurance benchmark, access to existing imperfect insurance reduces median wealth by 16% and generates a modest 0.6% welfare gain. Eliminating nonpayment risk would substantially increase insurance ownership, yield a further 11% decline in median savings, and generate an additional 1.7% welfare gain.
35122.zh_abstract: 我们利用新颖的调查数据和结构性生命周期模型，研究消费者对储蓄、人寿保险、年金和长期护理保险的需求。我们记录到，个体感知到显著的保险不支付风险，并且这些信念能预测保险持有情况。将引出的信念嵌入一个不完全市场模型，并加入额外的现实世界保险特征后，我们匹配了低参与率的经验模式。与无保险基准相比，获得现有不完美保险使中位数财富减少16%，并产生0.6%的适度福利收益。消除不支付风险将大幅增加保险持有量，使中位数储蓄进一步下降11%，并额外产生1.7%的福利收益。
35122.meta: Programs：AG, AP, EFG, PE；JEL：D14, E21, G22

35121.title: Comparative Advantage and Colonial Monopoly: The Political Economy of Exclusive Trading Companies
35121.zh_title: 比较优势与殖民垄断：独家贸易公司的政治经济学
35121.authors: Sebastian Galiani, Ivan Lopez Cruz, Alessandra A. Palazzo, Gustavo Torrens
35121.abstract: This paper analyzes a central colonial institution: the monopolization of foreign trade through exclusive trading companies. We interpret this arrangement as an economic institution that creates a wedge between domestic and international prices—effectively an export tax—allowing metropolitan intermediaries to extract rents from colonial trade. Our primary theoretical contribution demonstrates that the economic and political consequences of this institutional form depend systematically on the structure of comparative advantage between the metropolis and the colony. While colonial export taxation unambiguously worsens the colony’s effective terms of trade, its effect on the metropolis is conditional. When the colony and metropolis are competitors—sharing a comparative advantage in the same sector—a colonial export tax can improve the metropolis’s terms of trade. Conversely, when they are complementary—specializing in different sectors—the same policy can deteriorate the metropolis’s terms of trade by raising the cost of imported inputs. Because these terms-of-trade movements generate distinct distributive effects, the colonial monopoly reshapes political coalitions within the metropolis, influencing whether exclusive trading companies persist or are dismantled. We formalize this mechanism in a parsimonious general equilibrium model and illustrate it through the historical experience of Great Britain, India, and the East India Company (EIC), presenting the EIC as a salient instance of a broader institutional logic.
35121.zh_abstract: 本文分析了一个核心的殖民制度：通过独家贸易公司垄断对外贸易。我们将这种安排解释为一种经济制度，它在国内价格与国际价格之间制造了一个楔子——实际上是一种出口税——使得宗主国的中间商能够从殖民贸易中榨取租金。我们的主要理论贡献在于证明，这种制度形式的经济和政治后果系统地取决于宗主国与殖民地之间的比较优势结构。虽然殖民地的出口税无疑会恶化殖民地的有效贸易条件，但其对宗主国的影响是有条件的。当殖民地和宗主国是竞争者——在相同部门拥有比较优势时——殖民地的出口税可以改善宗主国的贸易条件。相反，当它们是互补者——专门从事不同部门时——同样的政策可能因提高进口投入品的成本而恶化宗主国的贸易条件。由于这些贸易条件变动产生不同的分配效应，殖民垄断重塑了宗主国内部的政治联盟，影响着独家贸易公司是持续存在还是被废除。我们在一个简约的一般均衡模型中形式化了这一机制，并通过英国、印度和东印度公司的历史经验加以说明，将东印度公司呈现为更广泛制度逻辑的一个显著实例。

35120.title: Hysteresis and Selection in the Rise of Fascism: The ‘Ordinary Men’ of the Nazi Party
35120.zh_title: 法西斯主义兴起中的滞后效应与选择：纳粹党的“普通人”
35120.authors: Luis Bosshart, Max Deter, Leander Heldring, Cathrin C. Mohr, Matthias Weigand
35120.abstract: We digitize and analyze the near-universe of National Socialist German Workers’ Party (NSDAP) membership records and link them to population and industrial censuses. Four findings emerge. First, as the party expanded, its membership came to resemble the broader population more closely in occupational, demographic, and religious terms. Second, SS members’ characteristics remained different: younger, more educated, and more fanatical, as measured by the display of Nazi insignia in membership portraits. Third, within communities, coworkers, and families, early membership generated hysteresis, with subsequent entrants drawn from the same groups. Finally, local increases in party membership are associated with subsequent deportations of Germany’s Jews.
35120.zh_abstract: 我们将国家社会主义德国工人党（NSDAP）的近乎全部成员记录数字化，并将其与人口和工业普查数据关联起来。出现了四个发现。首先，随着党的扩张，其成员在职业、人口统计和宗教特征上越来越接近更广泛的人口。其次，党卫军成员的特征仍然不同：更年轻、受教育程度更高、更狂热——以成员肖像中展示纳粹标志来衡量。第三，在社区、同事和家庭内部，早期成员身份产生了滞后效应，后续加入者来自相同的群体。最后，地方党内成员的增加与随后对德国犹太人的驱逐相关联。

35119.title: How Reform Happens
35119.authors: Simeon Djankov, Edward L. Glaeser, Andrei Shleifer
35119.abstract: What determines whether and how regulations are reformed? We use a newly constructed data set of 3,590 successful and failed regulatory reforms in 189 countries, between 2005 and 2022, to address this question. We document that regulations have become more business friendly in some regulatory domains but not others. We also show that regulations are more business friendly in richer than in poorer countries, and that holding initial regulatory levels constant, richer countries also reform more. We present a model in which the successful passage of reforms is shaped by the number of veto points in the approval process, the social returns to reform, and the cost of compensating losers from reform, and then test it using our new data set. We find that richer countries have both higher reform attempt and success rates, but less impact of individual reforms on regulation than poorer countries. These findings are consistent with the model if richer countries are better at reform, perhaps because they can compensate losers more efficiently. Across the world, reform attempt rates are strongly correlated with reform success rates but not with reform impact levels. Within countries, a higher share of technological reform attempts is successful, compared to administrative or legal reforms, consistent with the importance of veto points.
35119.zh_abstract: 什么决定了监管改革是否以及如何进行？我们使用一个新建的数据集，涵盖2005年至2022年间189个国家的3,590次成功和失败的监管改革，来探讨这个问题。我们记录到，在某些监管领域，法规变得对商业更友好，但在其他领域则不然。我们还表明，富裕国家的法规比贫穷国家更有利于商业，并且，在初始监管水平不变的情况下，富裕国家也进行更多改革。我们提出了一个模型，其中改革的成功通过受到审批过程中的否决点数量、改革的社会回报以及补偿改革受损者的成本的影响，然后使用我们的新数据集对其进行检验。我们发现，富裕国家既有更高的改革尝试率也有更高的成功率，但每次改革对监管的影响小于贫穷国家。如果富裕国家更擅长改革，或许是因为它们能更有效地补偿受损者，那么这些发现与模型是一致的。在全球范围内，改革尝试率与改革成功率强相关，但与改革影响水平不相关。在国家内部，与技术性改革尝试相比，行政或法律改革的成功率较低，这与否决点的重要性一致。

35118.title: Gender-Specific Economic Shocks and Household Bargaining Power
35118.zh_title: 性别特定的经济冲击与家庭议价能力
35118.authors: Rania Gihleb, Osea Giuntella, Dor Morag
35118.abstract: Using machine learning and product-level data on single men’s and single women’s consumption patterns, we develop an index that quantifies the “gendered” nature of consumer goods. We use the index to investigate how gender-specific labor market shocks influence spending patterns within heterosexual households. Our findings reveal that industrial robot adoption, which worsened men’s relative economic position, shifted household consumption toward products predominantly purchased by single women. In contrast, the expansion of fracking, which boosted demand for young and less skilled men, yields suggestive but less robust evidence of increased spending on goods favored by single men. Although neither shock significantly altered total spending on children’s products, robot exposure led to a reallocation of spending toward goods more commonly purchased for daughters than for sons.
35118.zh_abstract: 利用机器学习以及关于单身男性和单身女性消费模式的产品层面数据，我们构建了一个量化消费品“性别化”程度的指数。我们使用该指数来研究性别特定的劳动力市场冲击如何影响异性恋家庭内部的消费模式。我们的发现表明，工业机器人的采用——这恶化了男性的相对经济地位——使家庭消费转向了主要由单身女性购买的产品。相比之下，水力压裂法的扩张——这增加了对年轻和低技能男性的需求——提供了提示性但不太稳健的证据，表明在单身男性偏好的商品上的支出有所增加。尽管这两种冲击都没有显著改变儿童产品的总支出，但接触机器人导致支出重新分配，转向更常为女儿而非儿子购买的商品。

35117.title: Does Employment Slow Cognitive Decline? Evidence from Labor Market Shocks
35117.zh_title: 就业能否减缓认知衰退？来自劳动力市场冲击的证据
35117.authors: Noah Arman Kouchekinia, David Neumark, Tim A. Bruckner
35117.abstract: With large gains in life expectancy, the population share of disability due to cognitive decline and dementia has substantially increased. Many older adults in the United States leave the workforce well before age 65. Correlational evidence suggests that leaving the workforce before retirement age could accelerate the pace of cognitive decline. We offer causal evidence, using HRS data for the United States, exploiting plausibly exogenous shifts in labor demand in local labor markets as a Bartik instrument for employment variation across these markets. We find substantial declines over time in cognitive scores stemming from negative labor demand shocks. These findings are concentrated among men aged 51 to 64, whose employment decisions and outcomes may be more sensitive to local labor market conditions than are these decisions or outcomes for women or for older men. Our evidence extends past work focusing narrowly on the retirement age window and provides further support to the notion that working to older ages may delay age-related cognitive decline.
35117.zh_abstract: 随着预期寿命的大幅增加，因认知衰退和痴呆导致的残疾人口比例显著上升。美国的许多老年人在65岁之前就离开了劳动力队伍。相关性证据表明，在退休年龄前离开劳动力队伍可能会加速认知衰退的速度。我们利用美国健康与退休研究（HRS）数据，将当地劳动力市场中看似外生的劳动力需求变化作为巴蒂克工具变量，来衡量这些市场中就业变化的因果效应。我们发现，负面的劳动力需求冲击导致认知得分随时间显著下降。这些发现集中在51至64岁的男性中，他们的就业决策和结果可能比女性或更年长男性对当地劳动力市场状况更敏感。我们的证据扩展了以往仅关注退休年龄窗口的研究，并进一步支持了“工作到更老年龄可能延缓与年龄相关的认知衰退”这一观点。

35116.title: Hedging Ambiguity with Pro-Social Preferences: an Illustration from Green Finance
35116.zh_title: 用亲社会偏好对冲模糊性：来自绿色金融的例证
35116.abstract: We explore how pro-social preferences interact with asymmetric ambiguity to influence investment decisions. We develop a model where financial returns are ambiguous (e.g., due to policy uncertainties), while social impact returns are risky or less ambiguous. Employing Gilboa-Schmeidler maxmin and Klibanoff-Marinacci-Mukerji smooth ambiguity frameworks, we demonstrate that pro-social motives act as a hedge, mitigating ambiguity aversion and reducing effective hurdle rates for ambiguous assets. This mechanism explains the resilience of impact investing in bridging environmental funding shortfalls and offers policy insights into how blended finance and standardization can convert ambiguity to risk. Distinct from prior work on blended finance structures, this study emphasizes the behavioral hedging role of social preferences in sustainable finance, with implications for accelerating just transitions amid polycrises.
35116.zh_abstract: 我们探讨了亲社会偏好如何与不对称模糊性相互作用，从而影响投资决策。我们构建了一个模型，其中财务回报是模糊的（例如，由于政策不确定性），而社会影响回报是有风险的或模糊性较低。运用Gilboa-Schmeidler最大最小和Klibanoff-Marinacci-Mukerji平滑模糊性框架，我们证明亲社会动机起到对冲作用，减轻了模糊厌恶，并降低了模糊资产的有效门槛收益率。这一机制解释了影响力投资在弥补环境资金缺口方面的韧性，并为混合融资和标准化如何将模糊性转化为风险提供了政策启示。与先前关于混合融资结构的研究不同，本研究强调了社会偏好在可持续金融中的行为对冲作用，对在多危机中加速公正转型具有启示意义。

35115.title: On the Resilience of Payment Methods
35115.authors: Fernando E. Alvarez, David Argente, Diana Van Patten
35115.abstract: We study the resilience of payment systems to large disruptions in digital infrastructure caused by natural disasters and outages. While advanced economies have rapidly shifted toward electronic payments, these systems depend critically on electricity and information technology, raising concerns about their reliability during crises. We combine high-frequency county-level electricity outage data with detailed weather records, transaction-level expenditure data, household scanner data, and new representative surveys from the United States, Spain, and Sweden. Event-study evidence shows that natural disasters---especially hurricanes---generate persistent outages that sharply reduce expenditures. Natural disasters by themselves do not alter households' choice of payment method; instead, shifts toward cash arise through three channels: electronic payment methods become unavailable, households increase cash holdings for precautionary reasons, and cash is subsequently spent once available ("cash burn"). Consistent with these mechanisms, payment composition shifts markedly: spending rises before disasters due to stockpiling, largely financed with credit, while after disasters digital payments decline and cash usage rises, particularly in areas experiencing outages. Survey evidence confirms that nearly half of consumers are unable to use their preferred electronic payment during outages and that cash serves as a key fallback. Exploiting variation in cash holdings across households and locations, we find that greater access to cash increases the likelihood of completing transactions during outages and mitigates expenditure declines. Complementary survey evidence and the immediate response to our information treatment show that outages and official guidance increase desired cash holdings. Finally, we embed an RCT in the NielsenIQ panel: roughly half of panel households receive authoritative preparedness guidance, and we follow their realized purchases through the subsequent hurricane season. This design provides a clean framework for causal identification of whether greater cash preparedness smooths consumption during weather shocks. Together, the observational, survey, and experimental components of the paper show that cash plays a critical role in sustaining economic activity during payment-system disruptions and point to the value of offline-capable payment instruments, including CBDCs, in increasingly digital economies.
35115.zh_abstract: 我们研究了支付系统在由自然灾害和停电造成的数字基础设施大规模中断中的韧性。虽然发达经济体已迅速转向电子支付，但这些系统严重依赖电力和信息技术，引发了对其在危机期间可靠性的担忧。我们结合了高频县级停电数据与详细的天气记录、交易级支出数据、家庭扫描仪数据以及来自美国、西班牙和瑞典的新代表性调查。事件研究证据表明，自然灾害——尤其是飓风——会产生持续性的停电，从而急剧减少支出。自然灾害本身并不会改变家庭对支付方式的选择；相反，向现金的转变通过三个渠道发生：电子支付方式变得不可用，家庭出于预防性原因增加现金持有，以及现金在可用后被花掉（“现金消耗”）。与这些机制一致，支付构成发生了显著变化：由于囤积，支出在灾害前上升，这主要通过信用卡融资，而在灾害后，数字支付下降，现金使用增加，尤其是在经历停电的地区。调查证据证实，近一半的消费者在停电期间无法使用他们偏好的电子支付，而现金则作为关键的备用手段。利用不同家庭和地点之间现金持有量的差异，我们发现，更多的现金获取渠道增加了在停电期间完成交易的可能性，并缓解了支出下降。补充性的调查证据以及对我们信息处理的即时反应表明，停电和官方指导增加了期望的现金持有量。最后，我们在NielsenIQ面板中嵌入了一项随机对照试验：大约一半的面板家庭收到了权威的备灾指导，我们跟踪他们在随后飓风季节的实际购买情况。这一设计为因果识别更大的现金储备是否能在天气冲击期间平滑消费提供了一个清晰的框架。总之，本文的观察性、调查性和实验性部分表明，现金在支付系统中断期间维持经济活动方面发挥着关键作用，并指出了在日益数字化的经济中，包括央行数字货币在内的离线支付工具的价值。

35114.title: Intermediate Input Prices and the Labor Share
35114.zh_title: 中间投入品价格与劳动份额
35114.abstract: We argue that the relative price of materials is an important determinant of the labor share of income. When materials and primary inputs are complements and the profit share is positive, a higher price of materials lowers the labor share and raises the profit share of value added, without requiring markups or returns to scale to change. We show that materials-price fluctuations align with U.S. labor-share trends, provide causal evidence on this mechanism across industries and commuting zones, and quantify its importance in a dynamic quantitative model. Finally, we use our mechanism to rationalize differential labor-share trends across countries.
35114.zh_abstract: 我们认为，材料的相对价格是劳动收入份额的一个重要决定因素。当材料与初级投入品是互补品且利润份额为正时，材料价格上升会降低劳动份额并提高增加值中的利润份额，这并不需要加成率或规模报酬发生变化。我们展示了材料价格波动与美国劳动份额趋势相一致，提供了关于这一机制在行业和通勤区层面的因果证据，并在一个动态定量模型中量化了其重要性。最后，我们利用我们的机制来解释各国之间不同的劳动份额趋势。

35113.title: A Blended Data Approach to Measuring Monthly Housing Starts: Satellite Imagery, Survey Data and More!
35113.zh_title: 衡量月度住房开工量的混合数据方法：卫星图像、调查数据等！
35113.authors: Nicole Czaplicki, Colin J. Shevlin, Hector R. Ferronato, Aidan D. Smith, Dwarakh V. Nayam, Lei Peng, Scott W. Springer, Doren Walker
35113.abstract: As part of the comprehensive Construction Re-engineering Initiative at the U.S. Census Bureau, alternative data sources are being considered to supplement or replace current data collection methods. For the Survey of Construction (SOC), which measures new residential construction, this includes observing housing starts from satellite imagery in place of the current interviews for housing starts conducted by field representatives. Satellite images are obtained monthly for a subset of places in the SOC sample. Convolutional neural network models are then applied to images to predict likely new residential construction projects, with the current focus being single-family housing starts. Several post prediction processing steps are applied including exclusions based on intersections with known buildings or roads, treatments for missing data due to cloud cover, and adjustments for the length of time between consecutive images, to ultimately produce place level estimates of housing starts. These place level estimates are then combined with the existing building permit level survey data to produce estimates of West South Central division level housing starts, an experimental data product from the Census Bureau.
35113.zh_abstract: 作为美国人口普查局全面建筑改造计划的一部分，正在考虑使用替代数据源来补充或取代当前的数据收集方法。对于衡量新建住宅建设的建筑调查（SOC），这包括通过卫星图像观察住房开工量，以取代目前由实地代表进行的住房开工量访谈。每月为SOC样本中的一部分地点获取卫星图像。然后，将卷积神经网络模型应用于图像，以预测可能的新建住宅建设项目，当前重点是单户住宅开工量。应用了几个预测后处理步骤，包括基于与已知建筑物或道路交叉点的排除、针对云层覆盖导致的数据缺失的处理，以及针对连续图像之间时间跨度的调整，最终生成地点层面的住房开工量估计值。然后，将这些地点层面的估计值与现有的建筑许可证层面调查数据相结合，以生成西中部分区层面的住房开工量估计值，这是人口普查局的一个实验性数据产品。

35112.title: The Effect of Choice Screens on Mobile Browser Usage: Evidence from the EU Digital Markets Act
35112.zh_title: 选择屏幕对移动浏览器使用的影响：来自欧盟《数字市场法案》的证据
35112.authors: Jesper Akesson, Kush Amlani, Raul Cepeda Suarez, Emily Chissell, Stefan Hunt, Michael Luca, Gemma Petrie
35112.abstract: Can active choice mitigate the effects of preset defaults? We study this question using a difference-in-differences design around the rollout of the EU’s Digital Markets Act, which required iOS and Android to display browser choice screens under certain conditions. We find large effects, with notable differences across platforms: from 15 months after the mandate onward, Firefox usage was 113 percent higher on iOS and 12 percent higher on Android relative to a no-mandate counterfactual. This gap is consistent with rollout differences, as Android showed choice screens primarily on new devices, whereas iOS also showed them on existing devices.
35112.zh_abstract: 主动选择能否减轻预设默认值的影响？我们围绕欧盟《数字市场法案》的推出，采用双重差分设计来研究这个问题。该法案要求iOS和Android在某些条件下显示浏览器选择屏幕。我们发现了显著的影响，且不同平台之间存在显著差异：从强制令实施15个月后起，与无强制令的反事实情况相比，iOS上的Firefox使用量高出113%，Android上则高出12%。这一差距与推广差异一致，因为Android主要在新设备上显示选择屏幕，而iOS也在现有设备上显示。

35111.title: The Welfare Effects of Protecting Older Workers
35111.zh_title: 保护老年工人的福利效应
35111.authors: Todd Morris, Stefan Staubli, Benoit Dostie
35111.abstract: We evaluate the welfare effects of five provincial mandatory retirement bans in Canada from 2005 to 2009 using linked employer-employee tax data. The bans sharply reduce retirements at age 65, with sizable announcement effects and heterogeneity across industries. Post-65 employment and earnings rise at least 14%, with gains comparable to a two-year increase in pension-eligibility ages. Older workers save more and spouses postpone retirement, benefiting public finances, with no observable effects on mortality or younger workers. Highly exposed firms reduce payroll costs via hiring adjustments while maintaining worker productivity and profitability. Our results suggest that protecting older workers was welfare-improving.
35111.zh_abstract: 我们利用关联的雇主-雇员税收数据，评估了加拿大2005年至2009年五项省级强制退休禁令的福利效应。这些禁令显著减少了65岁时的退休情况，存在显著的公告效应和行业异质性。65岁后的就业和收入至少增长了14%，其收益相当于养老金领取年龄提高两岁。老年工人储蓄更多，配偶推迟退休，这有利于公共财政，而对死亡率或年轻工人没有可观察到的影响。受影响较大的公司通过调整招聘来降低工资成本，同时保持工人的生产率和盈利能力。我们的结果表明，保护老年工人改善了福利。

35109.title: Early Childcare Attendance and Cognitive skills in Adolescence
35109.zh_title: 早期托幼出勤与青少年时期的认知能力
35109.authors: Ingvild Almås, Nina Drange, Costas Meghir, Henrik D. Zachrisson
35109.abstract: This paper examines the impact of early childcare on academic achievement for children in grade 5 and grade 9, based on a 2003 policy expansion that created quasi-random variation in slot availability for children aged 1–2. Starting childcare one year earlier increases math scores by 9.7% of a standard deviation (SD) in grade 9. Children whose mothers do not hold a high school diploma benefit by a significant 28% of a SD at grade 9, reducing the math achievement gap from children of higher-educated mothers by about one third. We also present evidence of strong improvements for children of immigrants.
35109.zh_abstract: 本文基于2003年的一项政策扩张，该政策为1-2岁儿童创造了准随机的托位可用性，考察了早期托幼对五年级和九年级学生学业成绩的影响。提前一年开始接受托幼服务，可使九年级的数学成绩提高9.7%的标准差。母亲没有高中文凭的儿童在九年级时受益显著，成绩提高了28%的标准差，这将他们与母亲受教育程度较高的儿童之间的数学成绩差距缩小了约三分之一。我们还提供了移民子女成绩显著提高的证据。

35108.title: Effects of Expanding Contraceptive Choice: New Evidence from Virginia's Contraceptive Access Initiative
35108.zh_title: 扩大避孕选择的影响：来自弗吉尼亚州避孕可及性倡议的新证据
35108.authors: Jessica H. Kiser, Analisa Packham, Janelle Anthony, Evelyn Escobar, Emily Yeatts
35108.abstract: In 2018, the Virginia Department of Health implemented the Contraceptive Access Initiative (CAI) to increase access to long-acting reversible contraceptives (LARCs). We use encounter-level data on contraceptive choice in participating CAI clinics and county-level natality data from 2014--2021 to estimate relative changes in LARC take-up and childbearing rates before and after the CAI. Difference-in-differences estimates indicate that the CAI reduced birth rates in participating counties by approximately 3 percent, or less than half of the effect size of other similar, state-level programs. We show that this smaller effect is likely due to existing high LARC take-up and contraceptive substitution.
35108.zh_abstract: 2018年，弗吉尼亚州卫生部实施了避孕可及性倡议（CAI），以增加长效可逆避孕药具（LARCs）的可及性。我们使用参与CAI诊所的避孕选择就诊层面数据以及2014-2021年的县级出生数据，来估计CAI实施前后LARC使用率和生育率的相对变化。双重差分估计表明，CAI使参与县的出生率降低了约3%，不到其他类似州级项目效果规模的一半。我们表明，这种较小的效果很可能是由于已有的高LARC使用率和避孕替代效应。

35107.title: The Domestic Political Economy of War: Evidence from Russia
35107.zh_title: 战争的国内政治经济学：来自俄罗斯的证据
35107.authors: Alena Gorbuntsova, Gaurav Khanna, Sultan Mehmood
35107.abstract: Wars are often framed as responses to external threats or shifts in the regional balance of power. Yet they can also serve domestic political ends. This paper studies how Russia’s escalations against Ukraine reshaped support for the regime and redistributed the burdens of war across the population. Combining ethnic Russian shares with election and independent polling data, we exploit two sharp geopolitical shocks, the 2014 annexation of Crimea and the 2022 full-scale invasion, in a difference-in-differences event-study design. We find that provinces with larger ethnic Russian populations exhibit sharp increases in support for President Putin following both episodes. At the same time, battlefield casualties fall disproportionately on regions with lower ethnic Russian shares, and attitudes toward the US and EU deteriorate sharply. On the Ukrainian side, Russian attacks are concentrated in areas with higher ethnic Russian shares rather than in resource-rich provinces. Explanations based on material extraction, Soviet symbolism, or differential exposure to external threats do not account for these patterns. Instead, the evidence is more consistent with ethnic identity playing a central role in the domestic political economy of the war. Our conclusions remain similar in fraud-adjusted electoral outcomes, with alternative ethnicity measures, under bounded departures from parallel trends, and after accounting for several baseline regional differences.
35107.zh_abstract: 战争通常被描述为对外部威胁或地区力量平衡变化的回应。然而，它们也可以服务于国内政治目的。本文研究了俄罗斯对乌克兰的升级行动如何重塑了对政权的支持，并在人口中重新分配了战争负担。结合俄罗斯族裔比例与选举和独立民调数据，我们利用两次尖锐的地缘政治冲击——2014年吞并克里米亚和2022年全面入侵——采用双重差分事件研究设计。我们发现，在这两次事件之后，俄罗斯族裔人口比例较大的省份对普京总统的支持率急剧上升。与此同时，战场伤亡不成比例地落在俄罗斯族裔比例较低的地区，而对美国和欧盟的态度急剧恶化。在乌克兰方面，俄罗斯的攻击集中在俄罗斯族裔比例较高的地区，而不是资源丰富的省份。基于物质开采、苏联象征或对外部威胁的不同暴露程度的解释并不能解释这些模式。相反，证据更符合族裔认同在战争的国内政治经济学中发挥核心作用的观点。在经欺诈调整的选举结果、使用替代族裔衡量指标、在平行趋势假设有界偏离的情况下，以及在考虑了若干基线区域差异之后，我们的结论仍然相似。

35106.title: China's Global Ownership
35106.authors: Jennie Bai, Luc Laeven, Yaojun Ke, Hong Ru
35106.abstract: We study the global footprint and real effects of Chinese overseas corporate ownership. By assembling a comprehensive micro-level dataset of 161,773 firms across 159 countries (2012–2021), we independently reconstruct multi-layered ownership chains to trace capital through offshore tax havens to its ultimate origin. This approach reveals a global footprint substantially broader than official FDI statistics. Chinese-controlled foreign assets expanded at 20% annually, reaching $\$2.1$ trillion or roughly 3% of global corporate assets by 2021. Chinese investors—particularly state-owned enterprises (SOEs)—strategically target R&D-intensive and supply-chain-linked firms. Following acquisition, target firms increase capital stock and R&D expenditures, yet these inputs fail to generate higher patent output and are accompanied by a significant decline in profitability. We document a novel 'innovation spillback' mechanism: while target innovation remains stagnant, Chinese parent firms experience a sharp acceleration in granted patents following their first developed-economy acquisition. Furthermore, a greater Chinese presence crowds out R&D at non-target peer firms, though aggregate industry-level innovation remains unchanged. China thus represents a distinctively state-driven model of global ownership that accepts weaker near-term performance to internalize technological capacity at home.
35106.zh_abstract: 我们研究了中国海外企业所有权的全球足迹及其实际影响。通过汇编涵盖159个国家161,773家企业的综合微观数据集（2012-2021年），我们独立重建了多层所有权链条，以追踪资本通过离岸避税天堂直至其最终来源。这一方法揭示的全球足迹远大于官方外国直接投资统计数据。中国控制的海外资产以每年20%的速度增长，到2021年达到2.1万亿美元，约占全球企业资产的3%。中国投资者——特别是国有企业——战略性地瞄准研发密集型和供应链关联企业。在收购后，目标企业增加了资本存量和研发支出，但这些投入未能产生更高的专利产出，并伴随着盈利能力的显著下降。我们记录了一种新颖的“创新回流”机制：虽然目标企业的创新保持停滞，但中国母公司在首次收购发达经济体企业后，其授权专利数量急剧加速增长。此外，中国企业的更大存在挤出了非目标同行企业的研发，尽管行业层面的总体创新保持不变。因此，中国代表了一种独特的国家驱动的全球所有权模式，该模式接受较弱的短期业绩，以在国内内化技术能力。
35106.meta: Programs：CF, IFM, ITI；JEL：F3, G32, G34, O3

35105.title: Trends in Health Inequalities among Spanish Retirees
35105.zh_title: 西班牙退休人员健康不平等趋势
35105.authors: Cristina Bellés-Obrero, Manuel Flores Mallo, Pilar García-Gómez, Sergi Jimenez-Martin, Judit Vall Castelló
35105.abstract: Spain, with one of the highest life expectancies globally and a rapidly ageing population, faces growing challenges in sustaining its pension, healthcare, and long-term care systems. This study examines trends in health inequalities among retired Spaniards from 2004 to 2022, using eight waves of the Survey of Health, Ageing and Retirement in Europe (SHARE). We analyse five health outcomes—limitations in daily and instrumental activities, number of chronic conditions, a composite health deficiency index, mental health (EURO-D scale), and cognitive performance—and use linear regression to assess income-related gradients, adjusted for age and sex. We also compute a catch-up time measure—the number of years a poorer individual would need to reach the same level of health as a richer individual—and concentration indices of bad health. We then examine how these inequalities change over time, allowing us to explore the potential influence of pension reforms within the context of Spain’s Beveridge-style healthcare system and tax-funded long-term care provision. Our results show no clear evidence that health inequality has increased from 2004 to 2022. These findings contribute to understanding how income disparities interact with social protection systems in ageing societies and inform the design of equitable health, long-term care, and pension policies.
35105.zh_abstract: 西班牙拥有全球最高的预期寿命之一且人口迅速老龄化，在维持其养老金、医疗保健和长期护理体系方面面临日益严峻的挑战。本研究利用欧洲健康、老龄化和退休调查的八轮数据，考察了2004年至2022年间西班牙退休人员健康不平等的趋势。我们分析了五项健康结果——日常活动限制和工具性活动限制、慢性病数量、综合健康缺陷指数、心理健康（EURO-D量表）和认知表现——并使用线性回归评估经年龄和性别调整后的收入相关梯度。我们还计算了一个追赶时间指标——一个较贫困个体需要多少年才能达到与较富裕个体相同的健康水平——以及不良健康的集中指数。然后，我们考察了这些不平等如何随时间变化，从而得以探索在西班牙贝弗里奇式医疗体系和税收资助的长期护理提供背景下养老金改革的潜在影响。我们的结果显示，没有明确证据表明健康不平等在2004年至2022年间有所加剧。这些发现有助于理解在老龄化社会中收入差距如何与社会保护体系相互作用，并为设计公平的健康、长期护理和养老金政策提供信息。

35163.title: How Poverty Fell
35163.authors: Vincent J. Armentano, Paul Niehaus, Tom Vogl
35163.abstract: The share of the global population living in extreme poverty fell dramatically from an estimated 36% in 1990 to 9% in 2015. We describe how this decline happened: the extent to which changes within as opposed to between cohorts contributed to poverty declines, and the key changes in the lives of households as they transitioned out of (and into) poverty. We do so using cross-sectional and panel sources that are representative or near-representative of five countries that collectively accounted for 75% of global poverty decline between 1990 and 2015. The data show that overlapping birth cohorts experienced the decline of poverty together over time, such that poverty decline can be viewed as a primarily within-cohort phenomenon. Within cohorts, the data reveal substantial churn, casting the challenge of escaping poverty as a “slippery slope” more than a long-term trap. The data also illustrate a diversity of pathways out of poverty: sectoral transitions, migration, and changing occupational choices and female labor force participation can all account for some part of poverty reduction, but in all but a handful of cases, a majority of households exiting poverty did so without experiencing these changes.
35163.zh_abstract: 全球极端贫困人口比例从1990年估计的36%大幅下降至2015年的9%。我们描述了这一下降是如何发生的：队列内部变化与队列间变化对贫困下降的贡献程度，以及家庭在摆脱（和陷入）贫困过程中生活的关键变化。我们使用了具有代表性或接近代表性的横截面和面板数据来源，这些数据覆盖了五个国家，这些国家共同占据了1990年至2015年间全球贫困下降的75%。数据显示，重叠的出生队列随着时间的推移共同经历了贫困的下降，因此贫困下降可以被视为一种主要发生在队列内部的现象。在队列内部，数据揭示了大量的流动，这使得摆脱贫困的挑战更像是一个“滑坡”，而非长期陷阱。数据还说明了摆脱贫困的多种途径：部门转型、迁移、职业选择的变化以及女性劳动参与率的提高都可以解释部分贫困减少，但在除少数情况外的所有案例中，大多数摆脱贫困的家庭并未经历这些变化。

35162.title: Tipping Points and Australia’s Social Media Ban
35162.zh_title: 禁令为何失败：临界点与澳大利亚的社交媒体禁令
35162.authors: Leonardo Bursztyn, Angela L. Duckworth, Rafael Jiménez-Durán, Aaron Leonard, Filip Milojević, Christopher Roth, Cass R. Sunstein
35162.abstract: In December 2025, Australia became the first country to ban youth under 16 years old from holding accounts on major social media platforms, a policy now under consideration in more than a dozen countries and in numerous states. Because social media use is inherently social, the effectiveness of a ban that is easy to circumvent may depend on whether compliance reaches a tipping point: a share of compliant peers high enough to make it optimal for individuals to comply themselves. We surveyed 835 Australian teenagers four months after the ban took effect and find that only about one in four 14–15-year-olds comply. The social environment around use has barely moved: most banned teens believe that their peers are still using banned platforms and cite social reasons for continuing use. Sustaining high compliance requires two ingredients: the share of compliers must be high enough and those who comply must find it preferable to continue complying. The current ban achieves neither. Teenagers report that they require roughly two-thirds of peers to stop using social media to stop themselves, far above the share currently complying. They also perceive compliers as less popular than non-compliers, so the more influential teens disproportionately stay on the platforms. Together, these patterns suggest that compliance is more likely to diminish than to rise. Sustaining higher compliance will likely require pairing the ban with instruments that act on social norms and individual incentives directly.
35162.zh_abstract: 2025年12月，澳大利亚成为第一个禁止16岁以下青少年在主要社交媒体平台持有账户的国家，这一政策目前正在十几个国家和众多州被考虑。由于社交媒体使用本质上是社会性的，一项易于规避的禁令的有效性可能取决于合规是否达到一个临界点：即合规同伴的比例足够高，以至于个人自身合规成为最优选择。我们在禁令生效四个月后调查了835名澳大利亚青少年，发现只有大约四分之一的14-15岁青少年遵守规定。围绕使用的社会环境几乎没有改变：大多数被禁青少年认为他们的同伴仍在使用的被禁平台，并引用社会原因作为继续使用的理由。维持高合规率需要两个要素：合规者的比例必须足够高，并且合规者必须发现继续合规是可取的。当前的禁令两者都未实现。青少年报告称，他们需要大约三分之二的同伴停止使用社交媒体才能让自己停止，这远高于目前合规的比例。他们还认为合规者不如不合规者受欢迎，因此更有影响力的青少年不成比例地留在平台上。综合来看，这些模式表明合规率更可能下降而非上升。要维持更高的合规率，很可能需要将禁令与直接作用于社会规范和个人激励的工具相结合。

35161.title: Shaping Society's Character: The Role of Schools in Developing Social and Emotional Skills
35161.zh_title: 塑造社会品格：学校在发展社交与情感技能中的作用
35161.abstract: This chapter examines how schools cultivate socio-emotional skills that influence both individual success and broader social cohesion. Moving beyond the traditional focus on cognitive ability, I argue that education plays a crucial role in fostering traits that promote cooperation, trust, and long-term societal well-being. Drawing on insights from neuroscience, psychology, and economics, I explore how schools shape not only academic and labor market outcomes but also intergenerational beliefs, attitudes, and the formation of social capital. Using evidence from experimental studies, I highlight how school-based interventions can instill perseverance, enhance social learning, and create environments that curb anti-social tendencies, promote prosocial behavior—ultimately influencing the cultural fabric of society. This perspective reframes education as a mechanism for building more equitable and cohesive communities.
35161.zh_abstract: 本章考察了学校如何培养影响个人成功和更广泛社会凝聚力的社交情感技能。超越传统上对认知能力的关注，我认为教育在培养促进合作、信任和长期社会福祉的特质方面发挥着关键作用。借鉴神经科学、心理学和经济学的见解，我探讨了学校如何不仅塑造学术和劳动力市场成果，还塑造代际信念、态度以及社会资本的形成。利用实验研究的证据，我强调了基于学校的干预措施如何能够灌输毅力、增强社会学习，并创造遏制反社会倾向、促进亲社会行为的环境——最终影响社会的文化结构。这一视角将教育重新定义为建设更公平、更具凝聚力的社区的一种机制。

35160.title: Adolescent Behavior, Learning, and Knowledge Diffusion: Evidence from a Randomized Experiment
35160.zh_title: 青少年行为、学习与知识扩散：来自一项随机实验的证据
35160.authors: Sule Alan, Kumar Biswas, Christina S. Hauser, Shwetlena Sabarwal
35160.abstract: Improving classroom behavior is a persistent challenge in low-resource education systems, where disruptive environments often derail instruction and limit learning. Yet little rigorous evidence exists on whether behavior management can serve as a lever for academic improvement. We evaluate a program that shifts responsibility for establishing behavioral norms and reducing classroom disruptions from teachers to students. Covering over 7,500 adolescents across 127 middle schools in Bangladesh, the program significantly improves the classroom social climate, fostering stronger cooperation, better behavioral norms, and more supportive peer networks. High-performing students benefit most, showing significant gains in math and verbal tests after the program. A follow-up 1.5 years later reveals that while social climate improvements fade, academic gains persist and extend to a broader set of students, though they remain concentrated among higher-ability peers. A key mechanism is enhanced academic support networks among high-ability students, facilitating peer learning and knowledge diffusion within this group.
35160.zh_abstract: 改善课堂行为是资源匮乏教育系统中一个持续的挑战，在这些系统中，混乱的环境常常扰乱教学并限制学习。然而，关于行为管理是否能成为提高学业成绩的杠杆，目前缺乏严谨的证据。我们评估了一个将建立行为规范和减少课堂干扰的责任从教师转移到学生的项目。该项目覆盖了孟加拉国127所中学的7500多名青少年，显著改善了课堂社会氛围，促进了更强的合作、更好的行为规范和更具支持性的同伴网络。表现优异的学生受益最多，在项目后的数学和语文测试中显示出显著进步。一年半后的跟踪调查显示，虽然社会氛围的改善逐渐消退，但学业成绩的提升持续存在，并扩展到更广泛的学生群体，尽管这些提升仍然集中在能力较强的同伴中。一个关键机制是增强了高能力学生之间的学术支持网络，促进了该群体内的同伴学习和知识扩散。

35159.title: Data Neutrality, Data Supply, and Market Competition
35159.zh_title: 数据中立、数据供给与市场竞争
35159.abstract: We analyze the effects of data neutrality regulations on downstream market competition, the incentive of the platform to produce data, and consumer welfare. In our framework, data neutrality requires that firms seeking access to the platform’s data be treated equally, irrespective of whether they are affiliated with the platform. We consider two forms of regulation. Under weak data neutrality, the platform must provide the same amount of data to affiliated and unaffiliated sellers; under strong data neutrality, it must also charge the same price. We show that weak data neutrality can be largely ineffective, as the platform may restore exclusion through discriminatory pricing. Strong data neutrality is more consequential, but it does not necessarily raise welfare. Although it broadens access and intensifies downstream competition, it also reduces the incentive of the platform to refine and produce data. Consequently, data neutrality can reduce the equilibrium amount of data available in the market, and this data-reduction effect can dominate its benefits, which enhance competition. These findings suggest that regulating access to platform data requires balancing fair competition against the incentive to generate valuable data inputs.
35159.zh_abstract: 我们分析了数据中立法规对下游市场竞争、平台生产数据的激励以及消费者福利的影响。在我们的框架中，数据中立要求寻求访问平台数据的公司无论是否与平台有关联都应受到平等对待。我们考虑了两种形式的监管。在弱数据中立下，平台必须向关联卖家和非关联卖家提供相同数量的数据；在强数据中立下，平台还必须收取相同的价格。我们表明，弱数据中立可能在很大程度上无效，因为平台可能通过歧视性定价来恢复排他性。强数据中立的影响更大，但它不一定能提高福利。尽管它扩大了访问权限并加剧了下游竞争，但它也降低了平台精炼和生产数据的激励。因此，数据中立可以减少市场上可用的数据均衡量，而这种数据减少效应可能主导其增强竞争的益处。这些发现表明，监管对平台数据的访问需要在公平竞争与激励生成有价值的数据投入之间取得平衡。
35159.meta: Programs：IO, LE, PE, PR；JEL：D4, L1, L4, L5

35158.title: Mosaics of Predictability
35158.authors: Lin William Cong, Guanhao Feng, Jingyu He, Yuanzhi Wang
35158.abstract: We argue that return predictability is a latent, asset-specific, and state-dependent characteristic. We develop an interpretable Panel Tree that endogenously partitions the U.S. equity panel into out-of-sample and persistent “mosaic” patterns, and estimate cluster-specific forecasting models. Predictability concentrates in stocks with large earnings surprises, high earnings–price ratios, and low trading volume. It is countercyclical, stronger when market dividend yields are high and liquidity is low. Accounting for predictability heterogeneity, which conventional models ignore, improves forecasts and yields portfolios with out-of-sample Sharpe ratios around 2. Across 50 years of data, the mosaic map shows where signals arise and where noise dominates.
35158.zh_abstract: 我们认为，回报可预测性是一种潜在的、资产特定的且依赖于状态的特征。我们开发了一个可解释的面板树，该树将美国股票面板内生地划分为样本外且持久的“马赛克”模式，并估计了特定聚类的预测模型。可预测性集中在具有较大盈利意外、高盈利价格比和低交易量的股票中。它是逆周期的，当市场股息收益率高且流动性低时更强。考虑可预测性异质性（传统模型忽略了这一点）可以改进预测，并产生样本外夏普比率约为2的投资组合。在50年的数据中，马赛克图显示了信号出现在哪里以及噪声在哪里占主导地位。

35157.title: Automation, Learning, and Career Dynamics
35157.zh_title: 自动化、学习与职业动态
35157.authors: Hassan Afrouzi, Andres Blanco, Andrés Drenik, Erik Hurst
35157.abstract: We study how an automating technology affects career dynamics, human capital, and welfare in an economy where workers acquire skill through the tasks they perform. In a continuous-time general equilibrium model, learning-by-doing is determined jointly with the share of tasks automated, the frontier of tasks managers maintain, and the worker-to-manager career transition. Economies with high learning capacity admit pairs of stationary equilibria strictly ranked by the aggregate learning rate. Cheaper technology has opposite effects across the two: in the high-learning equilibrium, it raises welfare through the learning channel itself; in the low-learning equilibrium, it tips the economy into a human-capital trap. The planner's first-best combines a tax on automation profits with a subsidy on frontier-maintenance expenditures at a common rate.
35157.zh_abstract: 我们研究了一项自动化技术如何影响一个经济体中通过执行任务获得技能的工人的职业动态、人力资本和福利。在一个连续时间的一般均衡模型中，边做边学与自动化任务份额、管理者维持的任务前沿以及工人到管理者的职业转型共同决定。具有高学习能力的经济体存在一对严格按总学习率排序的稳态均衡。更便宜的技术在这两种均衡中具有相反的影响：在高学习均衡中，它通过学习渠道本身提高福利；在低学习均衡中，它使经济陷入人力资本陷阱。计划者的最优方案是将对自动化利润征税与以共同税率补贴前沿维持支出相结合。

35156.title: Trade and the End of Antiquity
35156.abstract: What was the role of trade, and how did economic activity evolve at the End of Antiquity, when political power shifts away from the Mediterranean towards northern Europe and the Middle East? To answer those questions, we assemble a database of hundreds of thousands of ancient coins from the fourth to the tenth century, estimate a dynamic model of trade and money where coins gradually diffuse along trade routes, and recover granular regional trade and real consumption time series. Our estimates suggest that: Mediterranean trade was disrupted by the newly formed border between Islam and Christianity; economic activity shifts away from the Mediterranean starting in the fifth century; real consumption peaks in the Middle East in the eighth century; and by the end of the ninth century, Atlantic regions from Islamic Spain to Frankish northwestern Europe have become the wealthiest regions of the ancient western world.
35156.zh_abstract: 在古典时代晚期，当政治权力从地中海地区向北欧和中东转移时，贸易扮演了什么角色，经济活动又是如何演变的？为了回答这些问题，我们建立了一个包含从四世纪到十世纪数十万枚古代硬币的数据库，估计了一个贸易和货币的动态模型，其中硬币沿着贸易路线逐渐扩散，并恢复了细粒度的区域贸易和实际消费时间序列。我们的估计表明：地中海贸易因伊斯兰教与基督教之间新形成的边界而中断；经济活动从五世纪开始离开地中海地区；实际消费在八世纪的中东达到顶峰；到九世纪末，从伊斯兰西班牙到法兰克西北欧的大西洋地区已成为古代西方世界最富裕的地区。

35155.title: When Does Automating AI Research Produce Explosive Growth? Feedback Loops in Innovation Networks
35155.zh_title: 何时自动化人工智能研究会产生爆炸性增长？创新网络中的反馈循环
35155.authors: Tom Davidson, Basil Halperin, Thomas Houlden, Anton Korinek
35155.abstract: AI labs are increasingly using AI itself to accelerate AI research, creating a feedback loop that could lead to an intelligence explosion. We develop a general semi-endogenous growth model with an innovation network, where research and automation in one sector increase the productivity of research in other sectors, and derive a clean analytical condition under which growth becomes superexponential (``explosive''). We find that automating research can offset diminishing returns to ideas by activating two reinforcing channels: a technological feedback loop across research sectors, and an economic feedback loop in which higher output finances further research. Growth becomes explosive if the combined strength of technological and economic feedback loops overcomes diminishing returns. In a simple simulation calibrated to trends in AI progress, fully automating software research and modest (5%) automation in other sectors generates a singularity within six years. Bottlenecks do not overturn the result if task automation advances sufficiently fast.
35155.zh_abstract: 人工智能实验室正越来越多地使用人工智能本身来加速人工智能研究，这创造了一个可能导致智能爆炸的反馈循环。我们构建了一个带有创新网络的一般半内生增长模型，在该模型中，一个部门的研究和自动化会提高其他部门的研究生产率，并推导出一个简洁的分析条件，在该条件下增长变为超指数增长（“爆炸性”）。我们发现，自动化研究可以通过激活两个强化渠道来抵消思想的收益递减：跨研究部门的技术反馈循环，以及更高产出为进一步研究提供资金的经济反馈循环。如果技术和经济反馈循环的综合强度克服了收益递减，增长就会变得爆炸性。在一个根据人工智能进展趋势校准的简单模拟中，完全自动化软件研究以及在其他部门实现适度（5%）的自动化，会在六年内产生一个奇点。如果任务自动化进展足够快，瓶颈不会推翻这一结果。

35154.title: Replacement and Reputation
35154.authors: Navin Kartik, Elliot Lipnowski, Harry Pei
35154.abstract: Does electoral replacement ensure that officeholders eventually act in voters’ interests? We study a reputational model of accountability. Voters observe incumbents’ performance and decide whether to replace them. Politicians may be “good” types who always exert effort or opportunists who may shirk. We find that good long-run outcomes are always attainable, though the mechanism and its robustness depend on economic conditions. In environments conducive to incentive provision, some equilibria feature sustained effort, yet others exhibit some long-run shirking. In the complementary case, opportunists are never fully disciplined, but selection dominates: every equilibrium eventually settles on a good politician, yielding permanent effort.
35154.zh_abstract: 选举更替是否能确保官员最终按照选民的利益行事？我们研究了一个声誉模型下的问责制。选民观察现任者的表现，并决定是否替换他们。政治家可能是始终付出努力的“好”类型，也可能是可能偷懒的机会主义者。我们发现，良好的长期结果总是可以实现的，尽管其机制和稳健性取决于经济条件。在有利于激励提供的环境中，一些均衡表现出持续的努力，而另一些均衡则表现出一些长期的偷懒。在互补的情况下，机会主义者永远不会被完全约束，但选择效应占主导地位：每个均衡最终都会稳定在一个好的政治家身上，从而产生持续的努力。

35153.title: AI Managed Household Portfolios: A Preliminary Report
35153.zh_title: 人工智能管理的家庭投资组合：初步报告
35153.authors: Bruce I. Carlin, Ryan D. Israelsen, Christopher F. Wazzan
35153.abstract: How does AI manage household stock portfolios? We collect a prospective, daily time-series of stock recommendations using several LLM's and study AI's investment style. AI recommends undiversified portfolios that positively load on momentum, large companies, and low book-to-market firms. AI primarily recommends stocks based on how much media attention firms receive. Using multiple versions of queries and requests, we find that buy-and-hold and actively managed AI portfolios do not appear to earn statistically-significant abnormal returns based on the methodology of Daniel et al (1997).
35153.zh_abstract: 人工智能如何管理家庭股票投资组合？我们使用几种大型语言模型收集了一个前瞻性的、每日的股票推荐时间序列，并研究了人工智能的投资风格。人工智能推荐的投资组合多元化程度低，正向载荷于动量、大公司和低账面市值比公司。人工智能主要根据公司获得媒体关注的程度来推荐股票。通过使用多种版本的查询和请求，我们发现，基于Daniel等人（1997）的方法，买入持有和主动管理的人工智能投资组合似乎并未获得统计上显著的异常回报。

35152.title: Mothers, Schools, and the Making of American Human Capital Mobility
35152.zh_title: 母亲、学校与美国人力资本流动性的形成
35152.authors: Lukas Althoff, Harriet M. Brookes Gray, Hugo Reichardt
35152.abstract: How did the US become a land of opportunity? Previous historical research on intergenerational mobility has focused on father-son income correlations, masking the role of mothers. We introduce a new mobility measure that incorporates both parents' human capital, develop a latent variable method leveraging literacy as a proxy, and construct a representative linked panel that includes women. We find that intergenerational mobility—in both human capital and income—rose sharply from the 19th to the 20th century. Initially, maternal human capital was most predictive of children's outcomes. However, as schooling expanded, this reliance declined and intergenerational mobility rose. America's investment in mass education has therefore been central to its rise as a mobile society.
35152.zh_abstract: 美国是如何成为一个充满机遇的国度的？以往关于代际流动性的历史研究主要集中在父子收入相关性上，掩盖了母亲的作用。我们引入了一个新的流动性衡量指标，该指标纳入了父母双方的人力资本，开发了一种利用识字率作为代理变量的潜变量方法，并构建了一个包含女性的代表性关联面板。我们发现，从19世纪到20世纪，人力资本和收入方面的代际流动性都急剧上升。最初，母亲的人力资本最能预测子女的成果。然而，随着学校教育的扩展，这种依赖性下降，代际流动性上升。因此，美国对大众教育的投资是其崛起为一个流动性社会的核心。
35152.meta: Programs：CH, DAE, ED, LS, PE；JEL：C1, H10, H4, I20, J62, N0

35151.title: Retrospective Versus Prospective Meritocracy
35151.zh_title: 回顾性与前瞻性精英统治
35151.abstract: This article proposes a way of understanding meritocracy from retrospective versus prospective points of view. Retrospective meritocracy is static or backwards-looking: Merit is based on an individual’s characteristics or past achievements as representative of excellence or as desert for a position already obtained. Prospective meritocracy is forward-looking: Merit is functionally defined as the comparative contribution that an individual makes to a specified set of social objectives. I use formal models to show that these alternative conceptions have very different implications for meritocratic assignments of students to schools or workers to jobs and that they involve differing information needs for a policymaker. These different approaches to merit demonstrate how alternate versions of meritocracy may or may not be socially efficient. I discuss implications for the use of meritocracy as a desideratum for various public policy contexts.
35151.zh_abstract: 本文提出了一种从回顾性与前瞻性角度理解精英统治的方法。回顾性精英统治是静态的或向后看的：精英地位基于个人的特征或过去的成就，作为卓越的代表或对已获得职位的应得。前瞻性精英统治是向前看的：精英地位被功能性地定义为个人对一组特定社会目标所做的比较性贡献。我使用形式化模型表明，这些不同的概念对学生分配到学校或工人分配到工作岗位的精英统治安排有着非常不同的含义，并且它们涉及政策制定者不同的信息需求。这些不同的精英统治方法展示了精英统治的不同版本可能或不可能具有社会效率。我讨论了将精英统治作为各种公共政策背景下的一个期望目标的含义。
35151.meta: Programs：ED, EFG, LS；JEL：D63, D78, I24, I28, J24

35150.title: Beliefs, Attention, and Investments in Early Childhood
35150.zh_title: 信念、注意力与早期儿童投资
35150.authors: Flavio Cunha, Snejana Nihtianova, Jessica Rood, Anja-Lize van der Merwe
35150.abstract: We develop a model of parental investment in early childhood in which bandwidth-constrained parents hold distorted beliefs about the returns to responsive interaction. When capacity falls short of aspiration, motivated reasoning provides relief: the parent distorts her working belief downward, rationalizing low engagement. Distorted beliefs suppress responsive parenting, which generates no calibration evidence, which, in turn, confirms the distortion. The model identifies four channels through which interventions escape this self-sealing trap. A randomized controlled trial confirms the model's predictions on parental beliefs, measures of responsive parenting, behavioral engagement, and absence of impact on materials or placebo outcomes.
35150.zh_abstract: 我们构建了一个早期儿童父母投资模型，在该模型中，带宽受限的父母对回应性互动的回报持有扭曲的信念。当能力达不到期望时，动机性推理提供了缓解：父母向下扭曲其工作信念，为低参与度提供合理化理由。扭曲的信念抑制了回应性养育，这不会产生校准证据，进而又确认了这种扭曲。该模型识别了干预措施摆脱这种自我封闭陷阱的四个渠道。一项随机对照试验证实了该模型对父母信念、回应性养育测量、行为参与度以及在对物质或安慰剂结果无影响方面的预测。

35149.title: Firm Pay, Amenities, and Inequality
35149.zh_title: 企业薪酬、福利与不平等
35149.authors: Sydnee Caldwell, Ingrid Haegele, Jörg Heining
35149.abstract: We estimate firm-specific amenity valuations using discrete choice experiments embedded in a large-scale survey of German workers linked to administrative records. Workers rank hypothetical offers from real firms they would consider joining, with randomized wages identifying money-metric valuations. Valuations vary substantially across firms and demographic groups, yet a single index performs surprisingly well. Valuations are approximately orthogonal to firm wage premia; they therefore do not offset between-firm wage inequality. However, male-female differences in amenity valuations explain part of the gender wage gap.
35149.zh_abstract: 我们利用嵌入在一项与行政记录相关联的德国工人大规模调查中的离散选择实验，估计了企业特定的福利估值。工人对来自他们可能考虑加入的真实企业的假设性工作机会进行排序，随机化的工资识别出货币度量估值。估值在不同企业和人口群体之间差异很大，但一个单一指数表现得惊人地好。估值与企业工资溢价大致正交；因此，它们并未抵消企业间的工资不平等。然而，男女在福利估值上的差异解释了部分性别工资差距。

35148.title: The Labor Market as an Equilibrium Newsvendor Problem
35148.zh_title: 作为均衡报童问题的劳动力市场
35148.abstract: I study hiring under uncertainty when firms can either hold permanent labor as a buffer or hire from a spot market after demand is realized. I build a model where the spot market is endogenously determined such that when one firm relies more on spot labor, it thickens the market that other firms use as well. Individual firms do not internalize that contribution, so the competitive equilibrium involves too much buffering. I evaluate the model in the market for registered nurses using the universe of daily time sheet records from skilled nursing facilities. The data support the model’s general equilibrium predictions. Markets with thicker agency markets have less rationing conditional on total nursing hours, and thicker agency markets have compressed upper tails of permanent staffing and higher overall hours in the lower part of the distribution. Estimating a facility-level newsvendor model with heterogeneous spot market frictions and rationing costs I find that the nursing labor market was more efficient post-COVID, there are substantial welfare gains from lower spot market frictions, and that the marginal external benefit for a firm that participates in the spot market instead of hiring an employee as buffer averages 7 percent of wages. This labor market underprovides flexibility because the value of availability is not fully priced.
35148.zh_abstract: 我研究了需求不确定下的雇佣行为，此时企业既可以持有永久性劳动力作为缓冲，也可以在需求实现后从现货市场雇佣。我构建了一个模型，其中现货市场是内生的，以至于当一家企业更多地依赖现货劳动力时，它也会加厚其他企业所使用的市场。单个企业并未内化这一贡献，因此竞争均衡涉及过多的缓冲。我利用来自专业护理机构的每日考勤记录全样本数据，在注册护士市场中评估该模型。数据支持该模型的总体均衡预测。在总护理工时给定的条件下，代理市场更厚的市场配给更少，并且更厚的代理市场压缩了永久性人员配置的上尾，同时提高了分布下部的总工时。通过估计一个具有异质性现货市场摩擦和配给成本的设施层面报童模型，我发现新冠疫情后护理劳动力市场效率更高，降低现货市场摩擦能带来显著的福利收益，并且一家参与现货市场而非雇佣员工作为缓冲的企业的边际外部收益平均为工资的7%。这个劳动力市场提供的灵活性不足，因为可用性的价值没有被完全定价。

35147.title: Learning by Mail: The Impact of Correspondence Schools in Early 20th Century America
35147.zh_title: 函授学习：20世纪初美国函授学校的影响
35147.abstract: This paper examines correspondence education as an alternative educational pathway in early 20th-century America. Using newly digitized records from the International Correspondence Schools—the largest such institution, with over 4 million students by 1940—linked to census data, I show that enrollment increased the likelihood of skilled employment by 6-10pp within 3-10 years, particularly among younger students who used it as a substitute for high school. I develop a general equilibrium Roy-style model where individuals sort into educational options by ability. Consistent with the model, correspondence education facilitated skill acquisition for lower-ability individuals and improved selection into high school, amplifying its returns.
35147.zh_abstract: 本文研究了函授教育作为20世纪初美国替代性教育途径的作用。利用新近数字化的国际函授学校（截至1940年拥有超过400万学生，是当时规模最大的此类机构）记录，并与人口普查数据相关联，我发现，在3至10年内，注册函授课程使获得技能型工作的可能性提高了6至10个百分点，这一效应在将其用作高中替代教育的年轻学生中尤为显著。我构建了一个一般均衡的Roy式模型，在该模型中，个体根据能力选择不同的教育路径。与模型一致，函授教育促进了能力较低个体的技能获取，并改善了对高中教育的筛选，从而放大了其回报。

35146.title: Understanding Medicaid Managed Care: The Procured Competition Model
35146.zh_title: 理解医疗补助管理式医疗：采购竞争模型
35146.abstract: Medicaid is one of the largest public programs in the United States — providing health insurance to over 75 million low-income Americans — and over three quarters of its enrollees receive care via private “managed care” insurers. In this summary article, we make three central points about the economics of contracting out Medicaid to private insurers. First, the empirical evidence on Medicaid privatization is mixed: contracting out has not meaningfully reduced public costs or improved quality of care. Second, we propose a framework, which we call “procured competition,” to describe the unique structure of Medicaid managed care as a hybrid of public procurement and regulated competition. Third, we discuss the key policy levers across procurement, competition, and consumer choice in this model. Throughout, we highlight open research questions, arguing that the enormous variation in how states design these programs — combined with limited evidence on what works — represents a promising area for high-impact scholarship.
35146.zh_abstract: 医疗补助是美国最大的公共项目之一——为超过7500万低收入美国人提供健康保险——其超过四分之三的参保者通过私营的“管理式医疗”保险公司获得医疗服务。在这篇综述文章中，我们就将医疗补助外包给私营保险公司的经济学问题提出三个核心观点。首先，关于医疗补助私有化的实证证据是混合的：外包并未显著降低公共成本或改善护理质量。其次，我们提出了一个框架，称之为“采购竞争”，用以描述医疗补助管理式医疗作为公共采购与受监管竞争的混合体的独特结构。第三，我们讨论了该模型中涉及采购、竞争和消费者选择的关键政策杠杆。在整个过程中，我们强调了尚待解决的研究问题，认为各州在设计这些项目时存在的巨大差异——加上关于何种措施有效的有限证据——代表了一个有望产生高影响力学术成果的研究领域。
35146.meta: Programs：AG, EH, IO, PE；JEL：H0, I11, I13, L0

35145.title: The Annuity Puzzle Revisited: Barriers, Behavior, and Policy Paths to Lifetime Income
35145.zh_title: 再论年金谜题：终身收入的障碍、行为与政策路径
35145.authors: Hal E. Hershfield, Suzanne Shu, Jeffrey R. Brown, Abigail Hurwitz, Moshe Arye Milevsky, Olivia S. Mitchell, Tamiko Toland
35145.abstract: Wealth decumulation decisions, or how to optimize consumption over an uncertain remaining lifespan, are among the most difficult people face. They involve intertemporal tradeoffs, uncertainty, complexity, and emotion, yet many consumers receive little formal guidance. A central challenge is securing lifetime income and avoiding outliving resources, particularly through life annuities that guarantee income for life. Standard economic models predict high demand for annuities, but in practice few individuals purchase them, a gap known as the annuity puzzle. This paper introduces annuities, examines limited adoption among consumers and plan sponsors, reviews leading explanations, and outlines approaches to increase uptake and improve decision quality.
35145.zh_abstract: 财富变现决策，即如何在不确定的剩余寿命内优化消费，是人们面临的最困难决策之一。这些决策涉及跨期权衡、不确定性、复杂性和情感因素，然而许多消费者很少得到正式指导。一个核心挑战是确保终身收入并避免资源耗尽，特别是通过保证终身收入的生命年金。标准经济模型预测对年金有很高的需求，但在实践中，很少有人购买它们，这一差距被称为年金谜题。本文介绍了年金，考察了消费者和计划发起人对其采用有限的情况，回顾了主要的解释，并概述了提高采用率和改善决策质量的方法。
35145.meta: Programs：AG, PE；JEL：D14, G11, G23, H55, J26

35144.title: Characteristics of a Sufficient Statistic to Measure City Housing Prices
35144.zh_title: 衡量城市住房价格的充分统计量特征
35144.authors: Daniel Broxterman, William Larson, Anthony Yezer
35144.abstract: Characterizing the level and change of housing prices in cities is central to many empirical questions, whether prices are measured using rents or asset values. The task is complicated by the heterogeneity of the housing stock, the joint consumption of housing and neighborhood, and differences in accessibility. This paper focuses on intra-city location which, based on economic theory, is systematically related to housing prices. The final conclusion is that a sufficient statistic to describe both the level of and change in the average housing price requires that prices be aggregated from relatively homogeneous market areas and weighted by housing quantities such as dwelling units or interior space. Common repeat-sales and hedonic indexes are generally not weighted in this fashion but could be modified to do so.
35144.zh_abstract: 描述城市住房价格的水平与变化，无论价格是用租金还是资产价值来衡量，都是许多实证问题的核心。这项任务因住房存量的异质性、住房与社区的联合消费以及可达性的差异而变得复杂。本文聚焦于城市内部区位，根据经济理论，这与住房价格存在系统性关联。最终结论是，要描述平均住房价格水平和变化的充分统计量，需要将价格从相对同质的市场区域汇总，并按住房数量（如居住单元或内部空间）进行加权。常见的重复销售指数和特征价格指数通常不采用这种加权方式，但可以进行修改以实现这一点。

35143.title: How Artificial Intelligence Shapes Science: Evidence from AlphaFold
35143.zh_title: 人工智能如何塑造科学：来自AlphaFold的证据
35143.abstract: We study how a frontier AI model affects scientific discovery by examining the release of the AlphaFold2 algorithm and its impact on structural biology and related fields of science. Structural biology is the field of science concerned with understanding the structure and function of proteins. Researchers in this field historically devoted substantial time and resources to experimentally solving three-dimensional protein structures. AlphaFold can predict these structures without running experiments. In July 2021, researchers gained access to hundreds of thousands of these AI-predicted structures virtually overnight. Yet, to date, we find that the rate of experimental structure determination has remained almost unchanged. Instead, researchers appear to use predicted structures to facilitate and complement experimental structure determination. Looking at downstream science that builds on protein structures, we find that basic research on proteins that had no structure information prior to AlphaFold increases by 15 to 40% relative to proteins that already had a structure, shifting the direction of research toward less-studied proteins. However, we find no evidence so far that more applied, early-stage drug development is targeting these proteins, though such activity may emerge in the future.
35143.zh_abstract: 我们通过研究AlphaFold2算法的发布及其对结构生物学及相关科学领域的影响，来考察前沿AI模型如何影响科学发现。结构生物学是致力于理解蛋白质结构与功能的科学领域。该领域的研究人员历史上投入了大量时间和资源，通过实验方法解析三维蛋白质结构。AlphaFold无需进行实验即可预测这些结构。2021年7月，研究人员几乎在一夜之间获得了数十万个由AI预测的结构。然而，迄今为止，我们发现实验性结构测定的速率几乎保持不变。相反，研究人员似乎利用预测结构来促进和补充实验性结构测定。着眼于建立在蛋白质结构基础上的下游科学，我们发现，与在AlphaFold之前已有结构信息的蛋白质相比，针对此前无结构信息的蛋白质的基础研究增加了15%至40%，从而将研究方向转向了研究较少的蛋白质。然而，我们迄今未发现证据表明，更应用性的、早期的药物开发正在针对这些蛋白质，尽管这种活动未来可能会出现。

35142.title: Seeing the Goal, Missing the Truth: Human Accountability for AI Bias
35142.zh_title: 看见目标，忽视真相：人类对AI偏见应负的责任
35142.authors: Sean S. Cao, Wei Jiang, Hui Xu
35142.abstract: This research explores how human-defined goals influence the behavior of Large Language Models (LLMs) through purpose-conditioned cognition. Using financial prediction tasks, we show that revealing the downstream use (e.g., predicting stock returns or earnings) of LLM outputs leads the LLM to generate biased sentiment and competition measures, even though these measures are intended to be downstream task–independent. Goal-aware prompting shifts these intermediate measures toward the disclosed downstream objective, producing in-sample overfitting. Specifically, purpose leakage improves performance on data prior to the LLM’s knowledge cutoff, but provides no advantage after the cutoff. This bias is strong enough that regularization of prompt instructions cannot fully address this form of overfitting. We further show that the bias can arise from users’ unintentional conversational context that hints at the purpose. Overall, we document that AI bias due to “seeing the goal” is not an algorithmic flaw, but stems from human accountability in research design.
35142.zh_abstract: 本研究探讨了人类定义的目标如何通过目的条件化认知影响大型语言模型的行为。利用金融预测任务，我们表明，揭示LLM输出的下游用途（例如，预测股票收益或盈利）会导致LLM生成有偏见的情绪和竞争度量指标，尽管这些指标本应独立于下游任务。感知目标的提示将这些中间指标转向所披露的下游目标，产生了样本内过拟合。具体来说，目的泄露提高了在LLM知识截止日期之前数据上的表现，但在截止日期之后没有提供任何优势。这种偏见足够强，以至于对提示指令进行正则化也无法完全解决这种形式的过拟合。我们进一步表明，这种偏见可能源于用户无意中暗示了目的的对话上下文。总体而言，我们记录到，由于“看见目标”导致的AI偏见并非算法缺陷，而是源于研究设计中人类应负的责任。

35141.title: The Microstructure of AI Diffusion: Evidence from Firms, Business Functions, and Worker Tasks
35141.zh_title: AI扩散的微观结构：来自企业、业务职能和工人任务的证据
35141.authors: Kathryn Bonney, Cory L. Breaux, Emin Dinlersoz, Lucia S. Foster, John C. Haltiwanger, Aditya A. Pande
35141.abstract: Using novel, nationally representative data from the 2026 AI supplement to the U.S. Census Bureau’s Business Trends and Outlook Survey (BTOS), we characterize AI diffusion across three layers: firm-wide adoption, business-function deployment, and worker-task use. During Nov 2025–Jan 2026, 18% of firms used AI in at least one function (32%, employment-weighted), with adoption expected to reach 22% within six months. Use is concentrated in large firms and knowledge-intensive sectors, reaching 50%–60% (60%–70%, employment-weighted) among very large firms in Information, Professional Services, and Finance. Among adopters, scope remains limited: 57% use AI in three or fewer functions, most often Sales and Marketing (52%), Strategy (45%), and IT (41%). Worker-level use appears in 23% (41%, employment-weighted) of firms, primarily for writing, document analysis, and information search; 65% restrict use to three or fewer tasks. Evidence suggests both top-down and bottom-up diffusion: worker use can occur without firm adoption, and vice versa. Most firms (66%) use AI for task augmentation, while employment reductions are rare (2%). Regression results show a positive relationship between firm performance and AI integration breadth. However, functional deployment and operational investment are associated with employment declines, while worker-task use is not once these factors are controlled for.
35141.zh_abstract: 利用来自2026年美国人口普查局商业趋势与展望调查AI补充模块的、具有全国代表性的新颖数据，我们在三个层面描述了AI的扩散特征：企业层面的采用、业务职能层面的部署以及工人任务层面的使用。在2025年11月至2026年1月期间，18%的企业在至少一项职能中使用了AI（按就业加权为32%），预计采用率将在六个月内达到22%。AI的使用集中在大型企业和知识密集型行业，在信息业、专业服务业和金融业的超大型企业中，采用率达到50%-60%（按就业加权为60%-70%）。在采用者中，范围仍然有限：57%的企业在三个或更少的职能中使用AI，最常见的是销售与营销（52%）、战略（45%）和信息技术（41%）。在23%（按就业加权为41%）的企业中出现了工人层面的使用，主要用于写作、文档分析和信息搜索；65%的企业将使用限制在三个或更少的任务上。证据表明存在自上而下和自下而上的扩散：工人使用可能发生在没有企业采用的情况下，反之亦然。大多数企业（66%）将AI用于任务增强，而裁员的情况很少见（2%）。回归结果显示，企业绩效与AI整合广度之间存在正相关关系。然而，一旦控制了这些因素，职能部署和运营投资与就业下降相关，而工人任务使用则不然。

35140.title: Who Marries Whom? The Role of Segregation by Race and Class
35140.zh_title: 谁与谁结婚？种族与阶级隔离的作用
35140.authors: Benjamin Goldman, Jamie Gracie, Sonya Porter
35140.abstract: Americans rarely marry outside their race or class group, a pattern with well-documented implications for inequality and intergenerational mobility. Limited exposure—or interactions with members of other groups—may partly explain these low intergroup marriage rates. We instrument for exposure using variation in childhood neighborhoods based on whether other race and class groups had more opposite-sex children of similar age. Exposure increases interclass (high- and low-parent-income) marriage but has no detectable effect on interracial (White and Black) marriage. A spatial marriage market model predicts that residential segregation—one of many forms of exposure—accounts for more than one third of marital sorting by class but less than 5% by race.
35140.zh_abstract: 美国人很少与自身种族或阶级群体之外的人结婚，这种模式对不平等和代际流动性具有充分记录的影响。有限的接触——即与其他群体成员的互动——可能部分解释了这些低水平的群体间通婚率。我们利用童年邻里间的变异，基于其他种族和阶级群体是否有更多年龄相近的异性儿童，来对接触进行工具变量估计。接触增加了跨阶级（高和低父母收入）婚姻，但对跨种族（白人和黑人）婚姻没有可检测到的影响。一个空间婚姻市场模型预测，居住隔离——接触的众多形式之一——解释了超过三分之一的阶级婚姻匹配，但仅解释了不到5%的种族婚姻匹配。
35140.meta: Programs：CH, PE；JEL：D31, J12, J15, J62, R23

35139.title: Filling the Gaps with MICE: Addressing Missing Data in Real Estate Price Indices
35139.zh_title: 用MICE填补空白：解决房地产价格指数中的缺失数据问题
35139.abstract: Missing data are a common feature of micro-level transaction data used to construct hedonic real estate price indices. Missingness typically occurs in the descriptive characteristics required for quality adjustment rather than in transaction prices. Since these characteristics are central to hedonic quality adjustment, complete-case analysis can skew measured price dynamics through sample-selection and composition effects. This paper proposes multiple imputation as a way to handle missing characteristic values in index construction. The aim is not to recover individual missing values, but to restore incomplete observations and reduce variability in the estimation sample. We employ multiple imputation by chained equations (MICE) as a flexible imputation framework. Since conventional aggregation rules for multiple imputation, Rubin’s rules, do not align with the multiplicative chaining structure of price indices, we introduce an alternative aggregation method based on pooled growth rates. Empirical evidence from two applications, a large dataset of Vienna apartment transactions and a smaller, more heterogeneous Austrian office market, shows that index estimates are relatively robust to missing data in large, homogeneous settings. In contrast, in thinner and more heterogeneous markets, imputation can materially affect index dynamics. In both settings, flexible MICE specifications with rich predictor sets perform better than simpler imputation methods.
35139.zh_abstract: 缺失数据是用于构建特征房地产价格指数的微观层面交易数据的一个常见特征。缺失通常发生在质量调整所需的描述性特征中，而不是在交易价格中。由于这些特征是特征质量调整的核心，完整案例分析会通过样本选择和构成效应扭曲所衡量的价格动态。本文提出将多重插补作为处理指数构建中缺失特征值的一种方法。其目的不是恢复单个缺失值，而是恢复不完整的观测值并减少估计样本中的变异性。我们采用链式方程多重插补（MICE）作为一个灵活的插补框架。由于传统的多重插补聚合规则，即鲁宾规则，与价格指数的乘法链式结构不一致，我们引入了一种基于汇总增长率的替代聚合方法。来自两个应用的经验证据——一个包含维也纳公寓交易的大型数据集和一个规模较小、异质性更强的奥地利写字楼市场——表明，在大型、同质的环境中，指数估计对缺失数据相对稳健。相比之下，在更薄、异质性更强的市场中，插补会显著影响指数动态。在这两种环境中，具有丰富预测变量集的灵活MICE规范比更简单的插补方法表现更好。

35138.title: Power to the Personnel? The Impacts of Managerial Discretion vs. Worker Democracy in Employee Recognition
35138.zh_title: 权力归于员工？员工表彰中管理层自由裁量权与工人民主的影响
35138.abstract: Worker agency—workers' influence over organizational decisions—is a commonly-cited determinant of employee engagement, productivity, and organizational culture. We conducted a firm-level RCT in India, randomizing whether employee recognition and associated bonuses were allocated: based on a worker vote (agency treatment), at the discretion of the manager (managerial discretion treatment), or at random and unrelated to performance (control). We find that workplace democracy increases worker attendance, but managerial discretion improves productivity. There are also implications for firm culture and knowledge spillovers, with the manager arm reducing work-related discussions between workers. Winners in the manager arm are positively selected on attendance and productivity, while those in the democracy arm are positively selected on attendance, social interactions, and likelihood of sharing the reward with co-workers in exchange for votes. These results highlight how what is valued in the workplace impacts worker behavior and firm culture, as well as the potential for informal contracts among workers to interact with workplace incentives.
35138.zh_abstract: 工人能动性——工人对组织决策的影响力——是员工敬业度、生产力和组织文化的一个常被引用的决定因素。我们在印度进行了一项企业层面的随机对照试验，随机分配员工表彰及相关奖金的分配方式：基于工人投票（能动性处理）、由经理自由裁量（管理层自由裁量处理）、或随机分配且与绩效无关（对照组）。我们发现，工作场所民主提高了工人的出勤率，但管理层自由裁量权提高了生产力。这对公司文化和知识溢出也有影响，管理层组减少了工人之间与工作相关的讨论。管理层组的获胜者在出勤率和生产力方面是正向选择的，而民主组的获胜者在出勤率、社交互动以及为换取选票而与同事分享奖励的可能性方面是正向选择的。这些结果突显了工作场所所重视的东西如何影响工人行为和企业文化，以及工人之间的非正式合同与工作场所激励相互作用的可能性。
35138.meta: Programs：DEV, LS；JEL：D22, D23, D70, J50, J54, M52, M54, O10

35137.title: Till the IRS Do Us Part: (Optimal) Taxation of Households
35137.zh_title: 直到国税局将我们分开：（最优）家庭税收
35137.authors: Hans A. Holter, Dirk Krueger, Serhiy Stepanchuk
35137.abstract: This paper argues that a progressive tax system combined with individual taxation of married couples can generate more revenue than the current household-based U.S. system, especially when the extra revenues do not induce negative labor supply effects through increased government transfers. A progressive system that taxes individuals rather than couples jointly leads to larger labor force participation and higher average human capital, creates more “fiscal space”, Laffer curves shift up and social welfare potentially rises. In our model with one- and two-earner households, human capital and an extensive margin labor supply decision, the peak of the Laffer curve is 18 percentage points higher with an individual-based, progressive tax system than with the current U.S. tax system. The maximum revenue is attained with 100% more progressivity than the current system, and at an average tax rate of 42%. Progressive taxation, when imposed on individuals rather than households, lowers the average tax rate for individuals with modest potential income that are close to the participation margin. At the same time, it creates a positive income effect on the labor supply of these individuals by reducing the net income of their higher earning spouses and limiting their net earnings potential in the case of a high temporary labor productivity. Steady state social welfare is larger with individual taxation. The optimal progressivity is higher than the current U.S. status quo, and results in welfare gains of 0.8% in consumption-equivalent variation. Cohorts born during the transition also experience significant welfare gains from this reform.
35137.zh_abstract: 本文认为，累进税制与已婚夫妇的个人征税相结合，可以比当前基于家庭的美国税制产生更多收入，特别是当额外收入不会通过增加的政府转移支付引发负面的劳动力供给效应时。一个对个人而非夫妇联合征税的累进税制会导致更高的劳动力参与率和更高的平均人力资本，创造更多的“财政空间”，拉弗曲线向上移动，社会福利可能上升。在我们的包含单职工和双职工家庭、人力资本和广泛边际劳动力供给决策的模型中，基于个人的累进税制下的拉弗曲线峰值比当前美国税制高出18个百分点。最大收入是在比当前制度高出100%的累进性下实现的，平均税率为42%。当对个人而非家庭征收累进税时，它降低了处于参与边际附近的潜在收入适中的个人的平均税率。同时，它通过减少这些个人中高收入配偶的净收入，并在高临时劳动生产率的情况下限制其净收入潜力，对这些个人的劳动力供给产生了正向收入效应。稳态社会福利在个人征税下更大。最优累进性高于当前美国的现状，并导致以消费等价变化衡量的福利收益为0.8%。在转型期间出生的群体也从这项改革中获得了显著的福利收益。
