35136.title: The State-Contingent Debt Premium: Evidence from French Public Bonds
35136.zh_title: 状态依存债务溢价：来自法国公共债券的证据
35136.authors: Kris James Mitchener, Gonçalo A. Pina
35136.abstract: State-contingent debt (SCD) instruments have been proposed as an improvement to sovereign debt markets, but their issuance costs are not well understood. We estimate the SCD premium at issuance and for more than a decade thereafter, employing a quasi-twin bond strategy that uses two very similar French government bonds issued in 1956: one conventional bond and one state-contingent bond with coupons linked to industrial production. At issuance, the expected yield on the SCD bond was 77 basis points higher than its twin. Due to robust growth in the French economy ex-post, the realized SCD premium at issuance was roughly twice as large (146 basis points). However, rising market prices of the state-contingent bond reduced both spreads to zero by 1964. They rose again in May 1968 following an unexpected general strike, which significantly reduced French industrial production; however, by 1970, the SCD premium had fallen to values close to zero.
35136.zh_abstract: 状态依存债务（SCD）工具已被提议作为主权债务市场的改进，但其发行成本尚不明确。我们采用准孪生债券策略，利用1956年发行的两种非常相似的法国政府债券——一种传统债券和一种息票与工业生产挂钩的状态依存债券——来估计发行时及此后十多年的SCD溢价。在发行时，SCD债券的预期收益率比其孪生债券高出77个基点。由于事后法国经济的强劲增长，发行时实现的SCD溢价大约是其两倍（146个基点）。然而，状态依存债券不断上涨的市场价格到1964年将这两个利差都降至零。在1968年5月一场意外的大罢工（显著降低了法国工业生产）之后，利差再次上升；然而，到1970年，SCD溢价已降至接近零的值。
35136.meta: Programs：DAE, IFM, ME；JEL：E43, E65, F4, H63, N14

35135.title: The Value of Reliable Statistics
35135.authors: Nicholas Bloom, Erica L. Groshen, Duncan Hobbs, Michael R. Strain
35135.abstract: On August 1, 2025, President Trump fired the head of the U.S. Bureau of Labor Statistics (BLS) and claimed that the agency’s data were “rigged.” In the aftermath, measures of economic policy uncertainty rose sharply, consistent with the idea that reduced trust in official data increases uncertainty for investors, businesses, and households. We use an event-study design to estimate the effect of the firing on policy uncertainty, and then map that increase in uncertainty into implied macroeconomic outcomes. This yields a back-of-the-envelope estimate of the marginal value of public trust in official statistics. Our baseline estimate implies that preserving trust in the integrity and quality of official statistics generates economic benefits of about $\$25$ for every $\$1$ spent on the agency’s budget.
35135.zh_abstract: 2025年8月1日，特朗普总统解雇了美国劳工统计局（BLS）局长，并声称该机构的数据被“操纵”。此后，经济政策不确定性指标急剧上升，这与对官方数据信任度降低会增加投资者、企业和家庭不确定性的观点一致。我们使用事件研究设计来估计此次解雇对政策不确定性的影响，然后将这种不确定性的增加映射为隐含的宏观经济结果。这得出了对官方统计中公众信任边际价值的粗略估计。我们的基准估计表明，维护对官方统计完整性和质量的信任所产生的经济效益约为该机构预算每花费1美元对应25美元。

35134.title: Taxes and Financial Distress: Evidence from Establishment-Level Data
35134.zh_title: 税收与财务困境：来自机构层面数据的证据
35134.abstract: We use establishment-level data to examine the relation between corporate taxes and financial distress. Using a border discontinuity design, we document that higher corporate income tax rates significantly increase financial distress, particularly for geographically concentrated firms, with sizable spillovers across establishments. We further investigate how taxes affect establishment-level financial distress by exploiting the interest limitation rule introduced by the 2017 Tax Cuts and Jobs Act. Using a difference-in-differences design, we find that affected firms experience a decline in financial distress. This occurs because the reduced tax advantage of debt induces firms to deleverage, reducing financial distress through capital structure adjustments.
35134.zh_abstract: 我们使用机构层面数据来检验公司税与财务困境之间的关系。利用边界断点设计，我们记录了较高的公司所得税税率会显著增加财务困境，特别是对于地理上集中的公司，并且在各机构之间存在显著的溢出效应。我们进一步利用2017年《减税与就业法案》引入的利息限制规则，研究了税收如何影响机构层面的财务困境。使用双重差分设计，我们发现受影响的公司经历了财务困境的下降。这是因为债务税收优势的减少促使公司去杠杆化，通过资本结构调整减少了财务困境。

35133.title: Technology Adoption and Optimal Policy
35133.authors: Fernando E. Alvarez, Francisco J. Buera, Nicholas Trachter
35133.abstract: We study optimal policy in a dynamic general equilibrium model where heterogeneous monopolistic competitive firms pay a fixed cost to adopt a frontier technology that grows exogenously. Using Mean Field Games tools, we show that the optimal policy consists of exactly two time-invariant subsidies: one correcting the static misallocation from market power, and one correcting the dynamic under-incentive to adopt. This holds outside of balanced growth paths, for any initial distribution of technology gaps. We analyze a simplified version of the model that aggregates to a Neoclassical Growth Model with an S-shaped production function whenever complementarities are strong, and fully characterize when the optimal policy uniquely implements the first best. When it does not, two novel results emerge: the efficient allocation prescribes escaping a poverty trap—providing an explicit optimality foundation for a Big Push—and, more surprisingly, escaping an abundance trap, where dismantling adopted technologies is optimal. In both cases, a temporary, costless supplementary policy restores unique implementation.
35133.zh_abstract: 我们研究了一个动态一般均衡模型中的最优政策，在该模型中，异质性垄断竞争企业支付固定成本以采纳外生增长的前沿技术。使用平均场博弈工具，我们表明最优政策恰好由两个时不变的补贴组成：一个纠正来自市场势力的静态错配，另一个纠正动态的采纳激励不足。这在平衡增长路径之外，对于任何初始的技术差距分布都成立。我们分析了该模型的一个简化版本，当互补性很强时，该版本汇总为一个具有S形生产函数的新古典增长模型，并完全刻画了最优政策何时唯一地实现第一最优。当它不能时，会出现两个新颖的结果：有效配置规定要摆脱贫困陷阱——为大推动提供了明确的最优性基础——以及更令人惊讶的是，摆脱丰裕陷阱，在这种情况下，拆除已采纳的技术是最优的。在这两种情况下，一项临时的、无成本的补充政策可以恢复唯一的实施。
35133.meta: Programs：EFG, ITI, PR；JEL：D92, O14, O25, O40

35132.title: The Effects of School Phone Bans: National Evidence from Lockable Pouches
35132.zh_title: 学校手机禁令的影响：来自可锁袋的全国性证据
35132.authors: Hunt Allcott, E. Jason Baron, Thomas Dee, Angela L. Duckworth, Matthew Gentzkow, Brian Jacob
35132.abstract: Schools across the U.S. have sharply restricted student use of phones during the school day. We evaluate one type of restriction—lockable phone pouches—using nationwide data combining large-scale surveys, GPS pings, standardized test scores, and school administrative records, along with sales records from the largest pouch provider. Using a staggered difference-in-differences design, we find that pouch adoption substantially reduces phone use as measured by GPS pings and teacher reports. In the first year after adoption, disciplinary incidents increase and student subjective well-being falls, consistent with short-term disruption. However, effects on well-being become positive in later years and disciplinary effects fade. For academic achievement, average effects on test scores are consistently close to zero. High schools see modest positive effects, particularly in math, while middle schools see small negative effects. We find little evidence of effects on school attendance, self-reported classroom attention, or perceived online bullying.
35132.zh_abstract: 美国各地的学校已严格限制学生在校期间使用手机。我们评估了一种限制措施——可锁手机袋——使用结合大规模调查、GPS定位、标准化考试成绩和学校行政记录的全国性数据，以及来自最大袋式供应商的销售记录。使用交错双重差分设计，我们发现采用手机袋显著减少了通过GPS定位和教师报告衡量的手机使用。在采用后的第一年，纪律事件增加，学生主观幸福感下降，这与短期干扰一致。然而，对幸福感的影响在后续年份变为正向，纪律效应逐渐消失。在学业成绩方面，对考试成绩的平均影响始终接近于零。高中看到了适度的正向效应，特别是在数学方面，而初中则看到了微小的负向效应。我们几乎没有发现对学校出勤率、自我报告的课堂注意力或感知到的网络欺凌有影响的证据。
35132.meta: Programs：CH, ED, EH, LS, PE；JEL：I28, I31, L86

35131.title: Wind Turbine Proximity and Health: Longitudinal Evidence from U.S. Households
35131.zh_title: 风力涡轮机邻近性与健康：来自美国家庭的纵向证据
35131.authors: Niklas Rott, Douglas Almond, Osea Giuntella
35131.abstract: Rapid growth of wind energy plays a key role in global efforts to reduce carbon emissions, yet public concerns persist about its potential health effects, particularly through noise exposure. While some studies and media reports suggest that wind turbines may contribute to sleep disturbances, anxiety, and even suicide, existing evidence remains limited and inconclusive. This study combines geolocated data on turbines from the U.S. Wind Turbine Database with longitudinal survey data on over 120,000 households (2011–2023) and consumer purchasing records to assess whether proximity to wind turbines affects mental and physical health. We examine a wide range of outcomes, including depression, anxiety, sleep disorders, headaches, and use of sleep aids and painkillers. Comparing households before and after nearby turbine installations, we find no detectable adverse health effects from turbine exposure at typical exposure distances. While we cannot rule out small effects, our confidence intervals exclude moderate-to-large impacts, suggesting that fears about substantial health impacts are not borne out in population-level data. Other disamenities such as noise, shadow flicker, and visual intrusion may still affect quality of life even absent measurable health impacts.
35131.zh_abstract: 风能的快速增长在全球减少碳排放的努力中发挥着关键作用，然而公众对其潜在健康影响（尤其是通过噪音暴露）的担忧依然存在。虽然一些研究和媒体报道表明，风力涡轮机可能导致睡眠障碍、焦虑甚至自杀，但现有证据仍然有限且尚无定论。本研究将美国风力涡轮机数据库中的地理定位数据与超过12万个家庭（2011-2023年）的纵向调查数据以及消费者购买记录相结合，以评估靠近风力涡轮机是否会影响心理和身体健康。我们考察了广泛的结果，包括抑郁、焦虑、睡眠障碍、头痛以及助眠药和止痛药的使用。通过比较附近涡轮机安装前后的家庭，我们发现，在典型的暴露距离下，涡轮机暴露并未带来可检测的不良健康影响。虽然我们不能排除微小的影响，但我们的置信区间排除了中等到较大的影响，这表明对重大健康影响的担忧并未在人口层面的数据中得到证实。即使没有可测量的健康影响，噪音、阴影闪烁和视觉侵入等其他不舒适因素仍可能影响生活质量。

35130.title: The Success of the Embedded State in England
35130.zh_title: 英格兰嵌入式国家的成功
35130.authors: Leander Heldring, Davis Kedrosky, James A. Robinson, Matthias Weigand
35130.abstract: Many states exhibit high degrees of capacity without the fiscal resources necessary to fund a modern bureaucracy. We argue that they achieve this by exploiting features of the social structure of the societies they govern to motivate individuals to engage in bureaucratic and governance tasks without pay. We develop and illustrate the concept of the “Embedded State” using a unique survey of British urban government from 1835. Since British local authorities had few resources, only two-thirds of positions were paid. We first show that unpaid positions were significantly more productive than paid ones. We then show that unpaid positions conveyed prestige and were ‘stepping stone’ positions, provided different on-the-job incentives, and were taken up by the socio-economic elite. We also show that the successful Embedded State featured patronage and corruption and could not fully motivate unpaid bureaucrats to implement onerous tasks.
35130.zh_abstract: 许多国家在缺乏资助现代官僚机构所需财政资源的情况下，却展现出高度的国家能力。我们认为，它们通过利用其所治理社会的社会结构特征，激励个人无偿从事官僚和治理任务来实现这一点。我们利用1835年英国城市政府的一项独特调查，发展并阐释了“嵌入式国家”的概念。由于英国地方当局资源匮乏，只有三分之二的职位是有薪的。我们首先表明，无薪职位的生产力显著高于有薪职位。然后我们表明，无薪职位具有声望，是“跳板”职位，提供了不同的在职激励，并且由社会经济精英担任。我们还表明，成功的嵌入式国家存在裙带关系和腐败，并且无法完全激励无薪官僚执行繁重的任务。
35130.meta: Programs：DAE, POL；JEL：D73, H11, H41, H50, N13, N43, N44

35129.title: Labor Market Impacts of ICE Activity in Trump 2.0
35129.zh_title: 特朗普2.0时期ICE活动对劳动力市场的影响
35129.abstract: We provide the first causal, national empirical analysis of the labor market impacts of heightened immigration enforcement during the second Trump administration. Enforcement increased everywhere, but, we take advantage of the fact that the increases have been uneven across geographic areas to classify areas as treated or control and then implement an event study and difference-in-differences design. Areas that experienced particularly large increases in the number of arrests also experienced a decrease in work among likely undocumented immigrants who remain in the U.S., compared to areas with smaller increases in arrests. We find no evidence of positive spillover effects to U.S.-born workers and U.S.-born workers who work in immigrant-heavy sectors are harmed.
35129.zh_abstract: 我们提供了关于特朗普第二届政府期间加强移民执法对劳动力市场影响的首次因果性、全国性实证分析。执法力度在全国范围内都有所增加，但我们利用各地区增幅不均这一事实，将地区划分为处理组和对照组，然后实施事件研究和双重差分设计。与逮捕增幅较小的地区相比，逮捕数量增幅特别大的地区，留在美国的疑似无证移民的就业率有所下降。我们没有发现对美国本土出生的工人产生正向溢出效应的证据，并且在移民密集型行业工作的美国本土出生的工人受到了损害。

35128.title: Complementary Climate Policies for Supply and Demand
35128.zh_title: 针对供给与需求的互补性气候政策
35128.abstract: The traditional approach to climate policy is to regulate the demand side, for example through an emissions fee. Supply-side regulation has received less attention. The two instruments are perfect substitutes in the first best but we show that they are complements in a second-best setting with free-riding incentives. Demand-side policies alone lower the market price of fossil fuels and raise the gains from trade for a country that defects. For a treaty to be maximally robust, strong, and self-enforcing, it must properly balance supply- and demand-side instruments. The results hold with homogeneous countries and are strengthened by heterogeneity.
35128.zh_abstract: 气候政策的传统方法是监管需求侧，例如通过排放费。供给侧监管受到的关注较少。这两种工具在一阶最优情况下是完全替代品，但我们表明，在存在搭便车激励的二阶最优情况下，它们是互补品。仅靠需求侧政策会降低化石燃料的市场价格，并提高违约国家的贸易收益。为了使条约具有最大程度的稳健性、强约束力和自我执行性，它必须适当平衡供给侧和需求侧工具。这一结果在同质国家中成立，并且因异质性而得到加强。

35127.title: Monetary Policy According to Households: Perceptions, Reactions and Channels
35127.zh_title: 家庭眼中的货币政策：认知、反应与传导渠道
35127.authors: Francesco Grigoli, Damiano Sandri, Yuriy Gorodnichenko, Olivier Coibion
35127.abstract: This paper studies how households perceive the transmission of monetary policy and how these perceptions affect their decisions. Using a large-scale survey of over 25,000 U.S. households combined with randomized information treatments, we measure how households expect changes in the federal funds rate to affect economic conditions and their own behavior. Households report that higher interest rates lead them to reduce their spending, particularly on durable goods. However, the mechanisms underlying this response differ markedly from those in standard macroeconomic models. Respondents expect monetary tightening to raise borrowing costs and inflation. In turn, consumption function estimates identified using information treatments reveal that households respond to higher expected inflation by reducing consumption. Household inflation expectations also emerge as a central driver of portfolio reallocations following monetary policy changes.
35127.zh_abstract: 本文研究家庭如何感知货币政策的传导，以及这些认知如何影响他们的决策。通过对超过25,000个美国家庭的大规模调查，并结合随机信息实验，我们衡量了家庭预期联邦基金利率变化将如何影响经济状况和他们自身的行为。家庭报告称，更高的利率导致他们减少支出，尤其是在耐用品上。然而，这种反应背后的机制与标准宏观经济模型中的机制存在显著差异。受访者预期货币紧缩会提高借贷成本和通货膨胀。反过来，利用信息实验估计的消费函数显示，家庭通过减少消费来应对更高的预期通胀。家庭通胀预期也显现为货币政策变化后投资组合重新配置的核心驱动因素。

35126.title: Industrial Policy with Development Characteristics: Fertilizer Policy in Times of Crisis
35126.zh_title: 具有发展特征的产业政策：危机时期的肥料政策
35126.abstract: We study time-consistent optimal policy when undiversified owner-operators face financial frictions and a planner with limited instruments. We apply it to fertilizer subsidies, one of the largest sector-specific policy instruments in the developing world and whose price is becoming increasingly volatile. We collect household-level data from 444 rural Rwandan villages from 2020 - 2024 and exploit the doubling of fertilizer prices after Russia’s invasion of Ukraine. Relative to less fertilizer-intensive villages, more fertilizer-intensive villages experience 30 percent lower fertilizer spending, 21 percent lower harvests, and 11 percent higher output prices. These patterns discipline key model elasticities. The optimal response balances a desire to reallocate production toward less fertilizer-dependent villages, while dampening the consumption loss in more fertilizer-dependent villages. Quantitatively, these forces offset and the subsidy remains at 10 percent before and after the shock.
35126.zh_abstract: 我们研究了当未多元化的自营农户面临金融摩擦且政策制定者工具有限时的时间一致最优政策。我们将其应用于肥料补贴，这是发展中国家最大的特定部门政策工具之一，其价格正变得越来越不稳定。我们收集了2020年至2024年卢旺达444个农村村庄的家庭层面数据，并利用了俄罗斯入侵乌克兰后肥料价格翻倍的情况。与肥料密集度较低的村庄相比，肥料密集度较高的村庄的肥料支出低30%，收成低21%，产出价格高11%。这些模式约束了关键模型的弹性。最优反应平衡了将生产重新分配到对肥料依赖程度较低的村庄的愿望，同时减轻了对肥料依赖程度较高的村庄的消费损失。从数量上看，这些力量相互抵消，补贴在冲击前后仍保持在10%。

35125.title: Sticky Traditions: Origin, Persistence, and Evolution of Cultural Norms
35125.zh_title: 粘性传统：文化规范的起源、持续与演变
35125.abstract: This chapter reviews the growing literature on the origin, persistence and evolution of cultural norms. I begin by examining the deep historical forces that shape the formation of cultural norms, with particular attention to the role of geography, pre-industrial societal characteristics, political institutions, and historical shocks. I then analyze the mechanisms through which cultural norms persist and evolve, emphasizing the roles of vertical, horizontal, and oblique transmission. Next, I examine the complex interaction between culture and institutions, and discuss the conditions under which cultural norms change. Several conclusions emerge. Cultural norms tend to persist over remarkably long periods, though the speed of change varies significantly across traits. Norms rooted in deep historical values are the most resistant to change, while attitudes related to pro-sociality and redistribution adapt more quickly. Understanding the origins and persistence of cultural norms has important implications for policy: policies that fail to account for local cultural context risk being ineffective or generating unintended consequences, while well-designed interventions can successfully shift cultural norms. Finally, I discuss the growing evidence on cultural mismatches — situations where norms that were adaptive in historical environments become maladaptive in new contexts — and outline directions for future research.
35125.zh_abstract: 本章回顾了关于文化规范起源、持续和演变方面日益增长的文献。我首先考察了塑造文化规范形成的深层历史力量，特别关注地理、前工业社会特征、政治制度和历史冲击的作用。然后，我分析了文化规范持续和演变的机制，强调了垂直、水平和斜向传播的作用。接下来，我审视了文化与制度之间复杂的相互作用，并讨论了文化规范发生变化的条件。得出了几个结论。文化规范往往在相当长的时期内持续存在，尽管变化的速度在不同特征之间差异显著。植根于深层历史价值观的规范最难以改变，而与亲社会性和再分配相关的态度则适应得更快。理解文化规范的起源和持续对政策具有重要启示：未能考虑当地文化背景的政策可能无效或产生意想不到的后果，而设计良好的干预措施可以成功改变文化规范。最后，我讨论了关于文化错配（即在历史环境中具有适应性的规范在新环境中变得不适应的情形）日益增多的证据，并概述了未来研究的方向。

35124.title: Rental Prices and the Cost of Living in the United States, 1914–2006
35124.zh_title: 美国租金价格与生活成本，1914-2006
35124.authors: Ronan C. Lyons, Allison Shertzer, Rowena Gray
35124.abstract: The Rent of Primary Residence (RoPR) series constructed by the Bureau of Labor Statistics (BLS) implies that nominal rental prices increased by just 2.6% per year from 1914 to 2006 while overall prices grew by 3.3%. We show that this “falling real rents” puzzle can be explained by the evolving treatment of shelter in the Consumer Price Index (CPI). In this paper we construct a new, methodologically consistent shelter price series using the Historical Housing Prices (HHP) Project rental index. We also construct a revised set of shelter weights going back to 1914 and combine them with the price series to create an alternate CPI that applies the owners’ equivalent rent (OER) concept of shelter consistently across time. The HHP shelter price series increases by a factor of 28.4 (compared with the 10.7 increase in RoPR) and lifts average CPI growth from 3.3% to 3.6% per year. The revised series eliminates the long-run decline in real rents in the CPI and provides a new benchmark for assessing trends in the cost of living and real income in the U.S. over the twentieth century.
35124.zh_abstract: 美国劳工统计局（BLS）构建的主要住所租金（RoPR）序列表明，从1914年到2006年，名义租金价格年均仅增长2.6%，而整体价格年均增长3.3%。我们表明，这种“实际租金下降”之谜可以通过消费者价格指数（CPI）中住房处理方式的演变来解释。在本文中，我们利用历史住房价格（HHP）项目租金指数构建了一个新的、方法上一致的住房价格序列。我们还构建了一套可追溯至1914年的修订版住房权重，并将其与价格序列相结合，创建了一个替代性CPI，该CPI在时间上一致地应用了业主等价租金（OER）的住房概念。HHP住房价格序列增长了28.4倍（而RoPR增长了10.7倍），并将CPI的平均年增长率从3.3%提升至3.6%。修订后的序列消除了CPI中实际租金的长期下降趋势，并为评估20世纪美国生活成本和实际收入的趋势提供了新的基准。

35194.title: Data Centers and Local Economies in the Age of AI: A Shift--Share Approach
35194.zh_title: 人工智能时代的数据中心与地方经济：一种偏移-份额方法
35194.authors: Fernando E. Alvarez, David Argente, Joyce Chow, Diana Van Patten
35194.abstract: Data centers are the physical infrastructure behind cloud computing, artificial intelligence, and enterprise software. The rapid diffusion of artificial intelligence (AI) is intensifying demand for compute, accelerating investment in data centers, and raising concerns about the local economic and environmental footprint of these facilities. Their expansion creates a local policy tradeoff. A data center can bring capital investment, construction activity, and specialized employment, but it can also increase demand for electricity, land, and grid capacity. This paper studies these effects at the U.S. county level. We assemble a facility-level panel of global data centers with precise coordinates, scale metrics, and annualized revenue. We map facilities to U.S. counties and combine them with County Business Patterns, county-level IRS income, county-level house prices, and electricity prices. To address endogenous siting, we instrument for data center growth using two shift-share instruments, which leverage pre-existing proximity to InterTubes long-haul fiber nodes and the 1980 county share of U.S. urban college population as shares, and both Chinese and rest-of-the-world data center revenue growth as shifts. The IV estimates show positive effects on total employment, data-processing employment, construction employment, establishments, house prices, and electricity prices at different horizons after data center growth. We also find positive effects on tax returns, adjusted gross income, and wages, while annual payroll responds less robustly. The results suggest that data centers create measurable local activity, increase house prices, and affect local electricity markets through higher prices.
35194.zh_abstract: 数据中心是云计算、人工智能和企业软件背后的物理基础设施。人工智能的快速普及正在加剧对算力的需求，加速数据中心投资，并引发对这些设施当地经济和环境足迹的担忧。它们的扩张造成了地方政策权衡。数据中心可以带来资本投资、建筑活动和专业就业，但也会增加对电力、土地和电网容量的需求。本文在美国县级层面研究了这些影响。我们收集了一个全球数据中心的设施级面板数据，包含精确坐标、规模指标和年化收入。我们将设施映射到美国各县，并将其与县商业模式、县级IRS收入、县级房价和电价相结合。为了解决内生选址问题，我们使用两个偏移-份额工具变量来工具化数据中心增长，这两个工具利用预先存在的与InterTubes长途光纤节点的邻近性和1980年美国城市大学人口的县级份额作为份额，并以中国和世界其他地区的数据中心收入增长作为偏移。IV估计显示，在数据中心增长后的不同时间跨度内，对总就业、数据处理就业、建筑就业、企业数量、房价和电价有正向影响。我们还发现对纳税申报单、调整后总收入（AGI）和工资有正向影响，而年度薪资总额的反应则不那么稳健。结果表明，数据中心创造了可衡量的地方经济活动，提高了房价，并通过更高的价格影响了当地电力市场。
35194.meta: Programs：AP, CF, CH, DEV, EEE, EFG, IFM, IO, ITI, LS, ME, PE, POL, PR；JEL：D8, O3

35193.title: Mortality Rates by Race and Ethnicity Among People with Disabilities
35193.zh_title: 残疾人群体的种族与族裔死亡率差异
35193.authors: Madeline S. Helfer, Becky Staiger, Jessica Van Parys
35193.abstract: This paper uses Medicaid claims data from 2017-2021 to measure racial/ethnic disparities in mid-life mortality among low-income adults with disabilities receiving Supplemental Security Income (SSI). We find that American Indian and Alaska Native and White SSI recipients have the highest age-adjusted mid-life mortality rates (2.9% and 2.6%, respectively), followed by Black and Hispanic recipients (2.3% and 1.9%), and then Asian recipients (1.6%). We also find differences in diagnosed chronic conditions, "despair-related" conditions, substance use disorders, and disabling conditions by race/ethnicity. Controlling for these differences attenuates the White-Hispanic, White-Asian, and AIAN-White mortality gaps; however, differences in clinical diagnoses by race do not affect the White-Black mortality gap. Our results show that within a socioeconomically vulnerable population, Black adults outlive Whites.
35193.zh_abstract: 本文利用2017-2021年的医疗补助索赔数据，衡量了领取补充保障收入（SSI）的低收入残疾成年人中，中年死亡率的种族/族裔差异。我们发现，美洲印第安人和阿拉斯加原住民以及白人SSI受助者的年龄调整后中年死亡率最高（分别为2.9%和2.6%），其次是黑人和西班牙裔受助者（分别为2.3%和1.9%），然后是亚裔受助者（1.6%）。我们还发现，不同种族/族裔群体在确诊的慢性病、“绝望相关”疾病、物质使用障碍和致残状况方面存在差异。控制这些差异后，白人与西班牙裔、白人与亚裔以及美洲印第安人与阿拉斯加原住民与白人之间的死亡率差距有所缩小；然而，种族间临床诊断的差异并未影响白人与黑人之间的死亡率差距。我们的结果表明，在社会经济弱势群体中，黑人成年人的寿命比白人更长。

35192.title: Algorithmic Credentialism
35192.abstract: The paper develops a framework for evaluating credential-coded algorithmic screens under existing civil rights law. AI-powered hiring tools trained on historical data often encode and automate bachelor's degree requirements as a proxy for worker skill, producing what this paper terms algorithmic credentialism. Drawing on labor economics research on workers Skilled Through Alternative Routes (STARs), disability theory's critique of the medical model, and disparate-impact doctrine from Griggs v. Duke Power Co. through the Civil Rights Act of 1991, it argues that such screens misidentify the source of hiring exclusion, locating it in the worker rather than in the design of the selection system. This institutional-design problem is amenable to evaluation under the existing disparate-impact doctrine. Under the paper's proposed framework, a credential-coded screen producing disparate impact triggers a legal obligation to validate the screen as job-related and consistent with business necessity, with skills-based hiring supplying the less-discriminatory alternative. The paper further argues that the efficiency rationale historically offered for degree screens is weakened, not strengthened, by AI. The same computational power that automates credentialism at scale can instead match applicants to jobs on multidimensional skill profiles, making the bachelor's degree a less necessary (and less legally defensible) proxy than it was in the pre-AI labor market.
35192.zh_abstract: 本文构建了一个框架，用于评估现行民权法下基于证书编码的算法筛选。基于历史数据训练的AI招聘工具，通常将学士学位要求编码并自动化，作为工人技能的代理指标，这产生了本文所称的“算法证书主义”。借鉴关于“通过替代途径获得技能”（STARs）工人的劳动经济学研究、残疾理论对医学模型的批判，以及从Griggs诉杜克电力公司案到1991年《民权法案》的差别影响原则，本文认为此类筛选错误地识别了招聘排斥的根源，将其归咎于工人而非选拔系统的设计。这一制度设计问题适用于现行差别影响原则下的评估。根据本文提出的框架，产生差别影响的证书编码筛选，会触发一项法律义务，即验证该筛选是否与工作相关且符合业务必要性，而基于技能的招聘则提供了歧视性更小的替代方案。本文进一步认为，历史上为学位筛选提供的效率理由，因AI而削弱而非增强。同样能够大规模自动化证书主义的计算能力，反而可以根据多维技能画像将求职者与职位匹配，使得学士学位作为代理指标的必要性（以及法律上的可辩护性）低于前AI劳动力市场。
35192.meta: Programs：ED, LE, LS, PE；JEL：J21, J24, J31, J60, J78, K31

35191.title: Organization Capital, Large Startups, and the Dearth of IPOs
35191.zh_title: 组织资本、大型初创企业与IPO匮乏
35191.authors: Rüdiger Fahlenbrach, Leandro Sanz, René M. Stulz
35191.abstract: Many startups in the 2000s have remained private after achieving large valuations, a pattern that funding availability alone cannot explain. We propose that startups relying heavily on organization capital to achieve economies of scale and network effects through digital technologies are more likely to become large private firms than exit earlier via an IPO or acquisition. Using LinkedIn data, we construct a novel measure of organization capital intensity for startups. Exploiting a legal shock that strengthened organization capital protection, we provide causal evidence that organization-capital-intensive startups are more likely to remain private and grow large rather than exit early.
35191.zh_abstract: 21世纪的许多初创企业在获得高估值后仍保持私有状态，这一模式仅凭融资可得性无法解释。我们提出，那些严重依赖组织资本，通过数字技术实现规模经济和网络效应的初创企业，更有可能成为大型私有企业，而非通过IPO或收购提前退出。利用领英数据，我们为初创企业构建了一个新颖的组织资本密集度衡量指标。利用一项加强组织资本保护的法律冲击，我们提供了因果证据，表明组织资本密集型初创企业更倾向于保持私有并发展壮大，而非提前退出。

35190.title: The Long-Run Effects of the Affordable Care Act: Evidence from a Partially Pre-Committed Research Design Over the COVID-19 Recession and Recovery
35190.zh_title: 《平价医疗法案》的长期效应：来自COVID-19衰退与复苏期间部分预先承诺研究设计的证据
35190.authors: Jeffrey Clemens, Anwita Mahajan, Joseph J. Sabia
35190.abstract: Adjustment frictions can cause the long-run effects of social insurance reforms to differ from their short-run effects. Using pre-committed extensions of event study specifications applied previously for short-run analyses, we test the hypothesis that the Affordable Care Act’s (ACA) impacts on insurance coverage and employment would increase following the substantial churn generated by the COVID-19 pandemic. Contrary to the hypothesis, the ACA’s impacts remained stable through the pandemic. Long-run effects on employment and employer coverage were modest and much smaller than initially projected. Our study illustrates how partially pre-committed designs can yield informative long-run estimates while limiting specification search.
35190.zh_abstract: 调整摩擦可能导致社会保险改革的长期效应与其短期效应不同。利用先前用于短期分析的事件研究设定的预先承诺扩展，我们检验了这样一个假设：《平价医疗法案》（ACA）对保险覆盖和就业的影响，会因COVID-19疫情带来的大量人员流动而增强。与假设相反，ACA的影响在整个疫情期间保持稳定。对就业和雇主保险的长期影响是适度的，且远小于最初的预测。我们的研究说明了部分预先承诺的设计如何能够在限制规范搜索的同时，产生信息量丰富的长期估计。
35190.meta: Programs：AG, EH, LS, PE；JEL：H51, H75, I13

35189.title: Crimes Against Campbell-Shiller
35189.abstract: The Campbell and Shiller (1988) log-linear approximation is widely viewed as a model-free accounting identity that always holds: in sample, in expectation, and under arbitrary subjective beliefs. None of these claims is true. The formula is far from automatic even in realized data. Many companies do not pay dividends, making the calculation ill-defined. For dividend payers, the results are not always what they seem. The formula registers buybacks and new issuance as phantom cash-flow shocks. Taking expectations comes with its own complications. Researchers see the forward-looking version of Campbell-Shiller as a dynamic Gordon model, but this interpretation requires investors to consistently think in present-value terms and to know the cap rate with basis-point precision. Both are strong assumptions that do not always hold in the data. Finally, the formula generically fails under arbitrary subjective beliefs. The exceptions represent knife-edge cases where forecast errors obey a precise adding-up condition. Insisting that Campbell-Shiller always holds makes it harder to learn about the true pricing model in the many cases where it does not.
35189.zh_abstract: Campbell和Shiller（1988）的对数线性近似被广泛视为一个无模型的会计恒等式，在样本内、期望值下以及任意主观信念下都始终成立。这些说法没有一个是正确的。即使在已实现的数据中，该公式也远非自动成立。许多公司不支付股息，使得计算无法定义。对于支付股息的公司，结果也并非总是表面看起来那样。该公式将股票回购和新股发行登记为虚幻的现金流冲击。引入期望值会带来其自身的复杂性。研究者将坎贝尔-席勒的前瞻性版本视为动态戈登模型，但这种解释要求投资者始终以现值思维进行思考，并且以基点精度知道资本化率。两者都是强有力的假设，在数据中并不总是成立。最后，该公式在任意主观信念下通常失效。例外情况代表的是临界情形，其中预测误差满足一个精确的加总条件。坚持认为坎贝尔-席勒恒等式始终成立，会使得在许多它并不成立的情况下，更难了解真实的定价模型。
35189.meta: Programs：AP, CF, EFG；JEL：G12, G14, G35, G40, G41

35188.title: Deep Research on a Loop: Using AI Agents to Construct Economic Datasets
35188.zh_title: 循环深度研究：使用AI代理构建经济数据集
35188.authors: Santiago Afonso, Sebastian Galiani, Ramiro H. Gálvez, Raul A. Sosa
35188.abstract: Constructing datasets from primary sources is one of the costliest tasks in empirical economics. We propose Deep Research on a Loop (DRIL), a methodology that uses AI agents to assemble datasets from publicly available sources. DRIL applies a fixed research instrument across a mapped unit space (e.g., countries by years), with a two-stage architecture separating design from implementation. The instrument specifies variables and coding rules, an evidence policy governs sources and citations, and data quality mechanisms track gaps and uncertainty explicitly. We exercise DRIL on a 2025 update of the Global Tax Expenditures Database for eight Latin American and Caribbean countries. The run produces 129 sources and 136 evidence records, covering 22 qualitative fields fully and 6 quantitative estimate types with documented gaps, at the cost of a standard LLM subscription comparable to a few hours of research-assistant work. We argue that even partial automation of dataset construction can shift the production function of empirical economics.
35188.zh_abstract: 从原始来源构建数据集是实证经济学中成本最高的任务之一。我们提出了“循环深度研究”（DRIL）方法，该方法使用AI代理从公开来源汇编数据集。DRIL在映射的单位空间（例如，按年份划分的国家）上应用固定的研究工具，采用将设计与实施分离的两阶段架构。该工具规定了变量和编码规则，证据政策管理来源和引用，数据质量机制明确追踪差距和不确定性。我们在2025年更新的八个拉丁美洲和加勒比国家全球税收支出数据库上对DRIL进行了实践。此次运行产生了129个来源和136条证据记录，完全覆盖了22个定性字段，并记录了6种定量估计类型的差距，其成本相当于标准LLM订阅费用，与几小时的研究助理工作相当。我们认为，即使是数据集构建的部分自动化，也能改变实证经济学的生产函数。

35187.title: Anti-Harassment Policy and the Startup Labor Market
35187.zh_title: 反骚扰政策与初创企业劳动力市场
35187.authors: Jun Chen, Song Ma, Feng Zhang
35187.abstract: This paper examines how anti-harassment legal reforms that weaken non-disclosure agreements (NDAs) in cases of workplace sexual harassment affect startups' hiring and organizational decisions. Using a staggered difference-in-differences design and LinkedIn data on over 50,000 U.S. venture-capital-backed startups from 2014–2022, we find that NDA reforms, although intended for employee protection, reduce female hiring by about 8%, with effects concentrated among junior women, who are statistically more prone to sexual harassment, and in small or male-dominated startups. The results apply to both the intensive and extensive margins of female hiring. Treated entrepreneurial firms also witness more departures of male managers, promote more women, and receive less VC funding. These results suggest that while NDA-weakening laws increase firms’ perceived legal risk and reduce female hiring, they also trigger internal restructuring that promotes women's advancement into leadership and may, over time, foster more accountable and inclusive organizational cultures.
35187.zh_abstract: 本文研究了在工作场所性骚扰案件中削弱保密协议（NDA）的反骚扰法律改革，如何影响初创企业的招聘和组织决策。利用交错双重差分设计以及2014-2022年间超过5万家美国风险投资支持初创企业的领英数据，我们发现，尽管NDA改革旨在保护员工，但它使女性招聘减少了约8%，这种影响集中在初级女性员工（她们在统计上更容易遭受性骚扰）以及小型或男性主导的初创企业中。该结果适用于女性招聘的集约边际和广延边际。受影响的创业企业还观察到更多男性管理者的离职，提拔了更多女性，并且获得的VC资金减少。这些结果表明，虽然削弱NDA的法律增加了企业感知的法律风险并减少了女性招聘，但它们也引发了内部重组，促进了女性晋升至领导岗位，并且随着时间的推移，可能培育出更负责任和更具包容性的组织文化。
35187.meta: Programs：CF, LE, LS, PE, POL, PR；JEL：G0, J0, K0, M14, M5

35186.title: AlphaGlass: Interpretable Characteristic-Based Portfolio Choice
35186.zh_title: AlphaGlass：可解释的基于特征的投资组合选择
35186.authors: Sebastian Bell, Ali Kakhbod, Martin Lettau, Abdolreza Nazemi
35186.abstract: We propose AlphaGlass, an inherently interpretable machine-learning framework for constructing portfolios that directly optimize investment objectives. AlphaGlass maps stock characteristics into additive signals with sparse interactions and converts these signals into long-short portfolios through a differentiable rank-and-mask layer. This end-to-end design allows the model to optimize objectives such as the Sharpe ratio or mean-variance utility while keeping portfolio weights interpretable and traceable to specific characteristics and interactions. We show theoretically that in-sample objective maximization consistently estimates the population objective and that the differentiable rank-and-mask layer is a faithful smooth proxy for the corresponding conventional long-short quantile portfolio. In U.S. equities, AlphaGlass delivers strong out-of-sample performance and reveals economically interpretable drivers of long and short positions.
35186.zh_abstract: 我们提出了AlphaGlass，一个本质上可解释的机器学习框架，用于构建直接优化投资目标的投资组合。AlphaGlass将股票特征映射为具有稀疏交互的加性信号，并通过一个可微分的排序与掩码层将这些信号转化为多空投资组合。这种端到端设计允许模型优化诸如夏普比率或均值-方差效用等目标，同时保持投资组合权重可解释，并可追溯到特定的特征和交互。我们从理论上证明，样本内目标最大化一致地估计了总体目标，并且可微分的排序与掩码层是相应传统多空分位数投资组合的忠实平滑代理。在美国股票市场中，AlphaGlass提供了强劲的样本外表现，并揭示了多头和空头头寸的经济可解释驱动因素。

35185.title: Revealing Life Preferences Through LLMs
35185.zh_title: 通过大语言模型揭示生活偏好
35185.authors: Omar Abdel Haq, Amitabh Chandra, Tomáš Jagelka, Erzo F.P. Luttmer, Joshua Schwartzstein
35185.abstract: Large Language Models (LLMs) are trained on a prodigious corpus of human writing and may reveal human preferences over characteristics of life courses, such as income, longevity, and working conditions. We present OpenAI's GPT-5.4 and a broadly representative sample of Americans with pairs of life stories and ask them to choose the life they would prefer for themselves. A person's choice is better predicted by the LLM's choice than by another person’s choice over the same stories, and LLM valuations of several life attributes are similar to those derived from human responses. Our results suggest that LLM responses offer a scalable and cost-effective complement to existing methods for studying human preferences.
35185.zh_abstract: 大语言模型（LLMs）在大量人类写作语料上进行训练，可能揭示人类对生活历程特征（如收入、寿命和工作条件）的偏好。我们向OpenAI的GPT-5.4和一个具有广泛代表性的美国样本提供成对的生活故事，并要求他们选择自己更偏好的生活。对于同一个人，其选择被LLM的选择预测得比另一个人的选择更准确，并且LLM对几种生活属性的估值与从人类反应中得出的估值相似。我们的结果表明，LLM的反应为研究人类偏好的现有方法提供了一种可扩展且成本效益高的补充。

35184.title: Breaking the Early Bell: Lessons from the First Statewide Mandate on School Start Times
35184.zh_title: 打破早铃：首个全州范围上学时间强制令的经验教训
35184.authors: Jialu (Gloria) Dou, Rania Gihleb, Osea Giuntella, Jakub Lonsky
35184.abstract: We examine the impact of California's Senate Bill 328 (SB 328), the first statewide mandate requiring later school start times for middle and high schools, on adolescent sleep, mental health, and academic outcomes. Using difference-in-differences and event- study designs across five data sources, we find that SB 328 increased the share of students sleeping at least 8 hours per night by 13%, meeting the CDC-recommended minimum for this age group. Average mental health effects are imprecisely estimated, but boys show significant reductions in sadness, hopelessness, and suicidal ideation, and Hispanic students, who experienced the largest sleep-timing shifts, show parallel reductions in difficulty concentrating; together these patterns are consistent with a dose-response relationship between sleep improvement and mental well-being. Math and English scores in grade 8 improved by approximately 0.08-0.10 standard deviations, with the largest gains among Hispanic and economically disadvantaged students. A within-state analysis using teachers' commute arrival times as a proxy for pre-policy school start times corroborates these findings, and shows academic gains accumulating over 2023-2025 alongside a suggestive decline in high school dropout rates.
35184.zh_abstract: 我们研究了加利福尼亚州参议院第328号法案（SB 328）的影响，这是首个要求中学和高中推迟上学时间的全州范围强制令，对青少年睡眠、心理健康和学业成果的影响。使用跨五个数据来源的双重差分和事件研究设计，我们发现SB 328使每晚至少睡8小时的学生比例增加了13%，达到了CDC推荐的该年龄段最低睡眠时长。平均心理健康效应的估计不精确，但男孩在悲伤、绝望和自杀意念方面显示出显著减少，而西班牙裔学生（经历了最大的睡眠时间变化）在注意力集中困难方面也显示出平行减少；这些模式共同表明睡眠改善与心理健康之间存在剂量反应关系。八年级的数学和英语成绩提高了约0.08-0.10个标准差，其中西班牙裔和经济弱势学生的进步最大。一项使用教师通勤到达时间作为政策前上学时间代理变量的州内分析证实了这些发现，并显示学业收益在2023-2025年间持续累积，同时高中辍学率呈下降趋势。
35184.meta: Programs：CH, EH, LS；JEL：I0, I1, I20, J0

35183.title: What Does A Grade Mean? Informativeness and Strategic Manipulation of Grading Systems
35183.zh_title: 成绩意味着什么？评分系统的信息性和策略性操纵
35183.authors: Joshua S. Gans, Scott Duke Kominers
35183.abstract: When do university grades permit informative comparisons across courses, and how does transcript adjustment affect student and instructor incentives? A raw grade mixes student performance with course-specific conditions, so grade-only comparisons fail whenever course effects are large enough to reverse ability rankings at grade cutoffs. We show that full transcripts can recover comparable student signals through what we call eigengrades: course-adjusted reports that use common or externally anchored grading standards and enrollment overlap to identify centered student effects. In the scalar additive benchmark, row-mean, affinity-spectral, and graph-Laplacian methods recover the same object. Eigengrades are, therefore, not a separate source of identification; they are a representation of fixed-effect adjustment. The framework also clarifies limits: ordinary letter grades with unanchored course-specific cutoffs do not separate course difficulty from grading standards, and multidimensional transcripts identify a skill-match subspace rather than a unique universal ranking unless the institution specifies a benchmark. Finally, exact difficulty adjustment removes the direct report-mediated incentive to choose easier courses and eliminates a competitive enrollment channel behind grade inflation, while leaving other strategic and governance margins intact.
35183.zh_abstract: 大学成绩何时允许跨课程进行信息性比较，成绩单调整如何影响学生和教师的激励？原始成绩混合了学生表现与课程特定条件，因此当课程效应大到足以在成绩截止点逆转能力排名时，仅基于成绩的比较就会失败。我们表明，完整成绩单可以通过我们称之为特征成绩（eigengrades）的方式恢复可比较的学生信号：即使用共同或外部锚定的评分标准和选课重叠来识别中心化学生效应的课程调整报告。在标量加性基准中，行均值、亲和谱和图拉普拉斯方法恢复相同的对象。因此，特征成绩不是独立的识别来源；它们是固定效应调整的一种表示。该框架也明确了局限性：具有未锚定课程特定截止点的普通字母成绩无法区分课程难度与评分标准，而多维成绩单识别的是技能匹配子空间，而非唯一的通用排名，除非机构指定一个基准。最后，精确的难度调整消除了由直接报告中介的选择更容易课程的激励，并消除了成绩膨胀背后的竞争性选课渠道，同时保留了其他策略和治理方面的余地。

35182.title: Growth is Getting Harder to Find, Not Ideas
35182.zh_title: 增长越来越难找到，而非创意
35182.authors: Teresa C. Fort, Nathan Goldschlag, Jack Liang, Peter K. Schott, Nikolas Zolas
35182.abstract: Relatively flat US productivity growth versus rising R&D expenditures is often interpreted as evidence that ideas are getting harder to find. We build a new 45-year panel tracking the universe of US firms' patenting to investigate the micro underpinnings of this conclusion, separately examining the relationships between research inputs and ideas (patents) versus ideas and growth. We find that average patents per R&D input are increasing, the elasticity of patents to R&D inputs is flat or rising, and there is not systematic evidence of a secular decline in patenting after controlling for research inputs. We then document a positive, significant, and fairly steady relationship between firms' patent and labor productivity growth rates. Average firm growth after controlling for patent growth, however, declines. Together, these results suggest that firms' innovative efforts play a key role in sustaining growth that has not diminished over the last four decades.
35182.zh_abstract: 相对平稳的美国生产率增长与不断上升的研发支出，通常被解释为创意越来越难找到的证据。我们构建了一个新的45年面板数据，追踪美国公司专利活动的全貌，以研究这一结论的微观基础，分别考察研究投入与创意（专利）之间以及创意与增长之间的关系。我们发现，每单位研发投入的平均专利数正在增加，专利对研发投入的弹性持平或上升，并且在控制研究投入后，没有系统性证据表明专利数量出现长期下降。然后，我们记录了公司专利增长率与劳动生产率增长率之间正向、显著且相当稳定的关系。然而，在控制专利增长后，平均公司增长率下降。综合来看，这些结果表明，公司的创新努力在维持增长方面发挥着关键作用，而这种作用在过去四十年中并未减弱。
35182.meta: Programs：EFG, ITI, PR；JEL：E0, O36, O40, O41, O47

35181.title: Youth Mental Health and School Smartphone Bans: Early Evidence
35181.zh_title: 青少年心理健康与学校智能手机禁令：初步证据
35181.abstract: This paper is the first to examine the causal effects of school smartphone bans on the mental health of youth in the US. Time series data show that the mental health of youth has been declining for the past decade. Several researchers argue that easy access to social media and other internet sites provided by smartphones is to blame. To provide causal evidence of the effects of these bans, I rely on synthetic difference-in-difference models and the National Survey of Children’s Health (NSCH) from 2016 to 2024. Currently, there are data for only one state with two post-ban periods and two states with one post-ban period, which makes the results preliminary evidence only. The outcome variables are screentime and measures of psychological wellbeing. Overall, these early results provide no clear evidence that the school ban policy reduced screentime or improved psychological wellbeing. Future studies with additional years of data, when they are available, are needed to increase power and to estimate the longer-term effects of school bans on youth mental health.
35181.zh_abstract: 本文首次考察了学校智能手机禁令对美国青少年心理健康的因果效应。时间序列数据显示，过去十年青少年心理健康状况持续下降。一些研究人员认为，智能手机提供的社交媒体和其他互联网网站的便捷访问是罪魁祸首。为了提供这些禁令效应的因果证据，我依赖于合成双重差分模型和2016年至2024年的全国儿童健康调查（NSCH）。目前，只有一个州拥有两个禁令后时期的数据，两个州拥有一个禁令后时期的数据，这使得结果仅为初步证据。结果变量是屏幕时间和心理健康指标。总体而言，这些初步结果没有提供明确证据表明学校禁令政策减少了屏幕时间或改善了心理健康。未来需要更多年份的数据（当数据可用时）进行研究，以增加统计效力并估计学校禁令对青少年心理健康的长期影响。

35180.title: The Persistence of Power: How Family Origins Shape Political Representation and Policy
35180.zh_title: 权力的持久性：家庭出身如何塑造政治代表性和政策
35180.authors: Eric Chyn, Katherine Cohen, Kareem Haggag, Bryan A. Stuart
35180.abstract: In the United States, long hailed as the land of opportunity, is access to political office truly open across society, or do the most privileged children disproportionately rise to enter political life? This question speaks to a longstanding concern that elite families may entrench themselves in positions of power, reproducing a form of hereditary privilege within a democratic system. We study the family backgrounds of U.S. politicians over the late nineteenth and early twentieth centuries and show that children from wealthy and privileged households have been substantially overrepresented in elected office. This imbalance has changed little over time and, at the highest levels of office, varies little across political parties. To test whether political access depends on family resources, we exploit the sudden economic shock caused by the end of slavery. Despite the large and concentrated losses at the top of the wealth distribution, the children of slaveholders continued to enter government at high rates. Finally, we examine whether politicians' socioeconomic origins shape policy by constructing a new sample of close elections linked to detailed information on U.S. House candidates' family backgrounds. Comparing otherwise similar districts in which a candidate from a high socioeconomic status family narrowly wins rather than loses, we find that districts represented by higher status candidates are less likely to support pro-tax positions in roll-call voting. Together, the evidence across our analyses shows that family background strongly predicts entry into political office and has measurable consequences for policy choices.
35180.zh_abstract: 在美国这个长期被誉为机遇之地的国家，进入政治职位的途径是否真正向社会各阶层开放，还是最特权的子女不成比例地崛起进入政治生活？这个问题涉及一个长期存在的担忧，即精英家庭可能固守权力职位，在民主制度内复制一种世袭特权形式。我们研究了19世纪末20世纪初美国政治家的家庭背景，并表明来自富裕和特权家庭的子女在民选职位中一直占据显著过高的比例。这种不平衡随着时间的推移变化甚微，并且在最高级别的职位中，不同政党之间差异很小。为了检验政治准入是否取决于家庭资源，我们利用了奴隶制终结造成的突然经济冲击。尽管财富顶层遭受了巨大且集中的损失，但奴隶主的子女继续以高比例进入政府。最后，我们通过构建一个新的与美国家庭背景详细信息相关联的众议院候选人紧密选举样本，检验了政治家的社会经济出身是否塑造政策。比较那些来自高社会经济地位家庭的候选人以微弱优势获胜而非失败的原本相似的选区，我们发现由地位较高候选人代表的选区在唱名投票中支持支持税收立场的可能性较低。综合来看，我们分析中的证据表明，家庭背景强烈预测进入政治职位，并对政策选择产生可衡量的影响。
35180.meta: Programs：DAE, POL；JEL：H10, H70, J45, J62, P16

35179.title: Bachelors Without Bachelor's: Gender Gaps in Education and Declining Marriage Rates
35179.zh_title: 没有学士学位的单身汉：教育中的性别差距与下降的结婚率
35179.authors: Clara Chambers, Benjamin Goldman, Joseph Winkelmann
35179.abstract: Over the past half-century, U.S. four-year colleges have shifted from enrolling mostly men to enrolling mostly women, while the economic position of non-college men has weakened markedly. We examine how these changes correspond with the evolving structure of marriage markets across cohorts and places. As college men have become increasingly scarce, college women have maintained stable marriage rates by marrying high-earning non-college men. This shift—combined with the broader economic decline of non-college men—has sharply reduced the pool of economically stable partners available to non-college women: the share of non-college men who earn above the national median and are not married to college women has fallen by more than 50%. Cross-area evidence shows that education gaps in marriage are smaller where non-college men face lower rates of joblessness and incarceration. Taken together, the evidence suggests that deteriorating outcomes for men have primarily undermined the marriage prospects of non-college women.
35179.zh_abstract: 在过去的半个世纪里，美国四年制大学从主要招收男性转变为主要招收女性，而非大学男性的经济地位显著削弱。我们考察了这些变化如何与跨代际和跨地区的婚姻市场结构演变相对应。随着大学男性变得越来越稀缺，大学女性通过嫁给高收入的非大学男性保持了稳定的结婚率。这种转变——加上非大学男性更广泛的经济衰退——急剧减少了非大学女性可获得的经济稳定伴侣的储备：收入高于全国中位数且未与大学女性结婚的非大学男性比例下降了超过50%。跨地区证据表明，在非大学男性失业率和监禁率较低的地区，教育方面的结婚率差距较小。综合来看，证据表明，男性日益恶化的结果主要削弱了非大学女性的婚姻前景。
35179.meta: Programs：CH, ED, PE；JEL：D31, I24, J1, J11, J12, J16

35178.title: Earnings Management and Price Informativeness
35178.zh_title: 盈余管理与价格信息含量
35178.authors: Zhiguo He, Wenxi Jiang, Wei Xiong
35178.abstract: We investigate the relationship between stock prices and future earnings in China's A-share market. In the cross-section, firms with higher market valuations report higher earnings over the subsequent one to five years, suggesting that stock prices contain information about future fundamentals. In the time series, however, we find evidence of earnings reversal: higher stock prices predict weaker earnings growth three to five years ahead, consistent with short-term earnings management induced by stock-price pressures. We further document such earnings management through non-recurring gains and losses (NRGLs) and use the 2020 delisting rule reform as a natural experiment to examine these mechanisms.
35178.zh_abstract: 我们研究了中国A股市场中股票价格与未来盈余之间的关系。在横截面上，市场估值较高的公司在未来一至五年内报告更高的盈余，这表明股票价格包含关于未来基本面的信息。然而，在时间序列上，我们发现了盈余反转的证据：较高的股票价格预测三至五年后较弱的盈余增长，这与股票价格压力导致的短期盈余管理一致。我们进一步通过非经常性损益（NRGLs）记录了这种盈余管理，并利用2020年退市规则改革作为自然实验来检验这些机制。

35177.title: Separations Revisited: Do Layoffs or Quits Drive Lower Separation Rates in High-Quality Firms?
35177.zh_title: 离职再审视：高质量企业较低的离职率是由解雇还是辞职驱动的？
35177.authors: Cauê Dobbin, Daniel Fernandez, Tom Zohar
35177.abstract: A well-known empirical regularity is that high-productivity firms have lower worker separation rates, but it is unclear whether this pattern reflects quits or layoffs. Using matched employer-employee data from Brazil that distinguish the reason for each separation, we show that the productivity-separation gradient is driven primarily by layoffs rather than quits. We then propose and test a mechanism in which downward wage rigidity prevents firms from adjusting wages in response to adverse shocks, causing those shocks to translate into layoffs. High-productivity firms are less exposed because their larger markdowns provide a buffer between productivity and wages. Consistent with this mechanism, we find that firms with higher markdowns have lower layoff rates, and that markets with stronger wage rigidity exhibit both higher layoff rates and a steeper productivity-layoff gradient. These findings suggest that productivity differences across firms shape not only wages, but also workers' exposure to job loss.
35177.zh_abstract: 一个广为人知的经验规律是，高生产率企业的员工离职率较低，但尚不清楚这一模式反映的是辞职还是解雇。利用巴西区分每次离职原因的雇主-雇员匹配数据，我们表明生产率-离职梯度主要由解雇而非辞职驱动。随后，我们提出并检验了一个机制：向下工资刚性阻止企业根据不利冲击调整工资，导致这些冲击转化为解雇。高生产率企业受影响较小，因为它们较大的加价幅度在生产率与工资之间提供了缓冲。与该机制一致，我们发现加价幅度较高的企业解雇率较低，而工资刚性较强的市场既表现出更高的解雇率，也表现出更陡峭的生产率-解雇梯度。这些发现表明，企业间的生产率差异不仅影响工资，也影响工人面临失业的风险。

35176.title: Measuring Water Misallocation in California
35176.zh_title: 衡量加利福尼亚州的水资源错配
35176.abstract: This paper proposes and applies new methods to value water rights and assess misallocation across competing uses in California, the world’s fourth largest economy. The empirical strategy combines detailed microdata on farms, evapotranspiration, historical water rights, and the hydrological flow network in order to isolate sources of inefficiency within the hydrological network, assess distributional implications of water access under current property rights, and evaluate alternative mechanisms for water reallocation.
35176.zh_abstract: 本文提出并应用新方法来评估水权价值以及衡量全球第四大经济体加利福尼亚州竞争性用途之间的水资源错配。该实证策略结合了关于农场、蒸散发、历史水权以及水文流动网络的详细微观数据，以隔离水文网络内部的低效来源，评估当前产权下水资源获取的分配影响，并评估水资源重新分配的替代机制。
35176.meta: Programs：EEE, IO；JEL：D23, D61, L1, L2, Q1, Q24, Q25

35175.title: The Causal Effects of Expected Depreciations
35175.authors: Martha Elena Delgado Rojas, Juan Herreño, Marc Hofstetter, Mathieu Pedemonte
35175.abstract: We construct a novel measure of one-year-ahead exchange rate forecasts and nowcasts for non-financial firms. We then study a randomized information intervention that provides a subset of firms with a publicly available exchange rate forecast. This information treatment persistently shifts exchange rate expectations and perceptions, with stronger effects for non-exporting firms. We link survey responses with administrative customs data and estimate a positive intertemporal elasticity of import demand to exogenous changes in expected future exchange rates. Our findings highlight the role of intertemporal substitution after anticipated changes in trade costs.
35175.zh_abstract: 我们为非金融企业构建了一种新颖的一年期汇率预测和现时预测的衡量指标。随后，我们研究了一项随机信息干预，该干预向一部分企业提供公开可用的汇率预测。这种信息处理持续地改变了汇率预期和认知，对非出口企业的影响更强。我们将调查回复与行政海关数据联系起来，并估计了进口需求对预期未来汇率外生变化的跨期弹性为正。我们的发现强调了在预期贸易成本变化后跨期替代的作用。
35175.meta: Programs：IFM, ITI, ME；JEL：E31, E71, F31, G41

35174.title: Authority Figures and the Polarization of Gender Norms
35174.zh_title: 权威人物与性别规范的两极分化
35174.authors: Ali Abboud, Samuel Bazzi, Serena Canaan, Antoine Deeb, Pierre Mouganie
35174.abstract: This paper examines how authority figures in higher education shape gender norms over the long run. We exploit the random assignment of first-year students to faculty advisors at an elite university in the Middle East and combine administrative records with an alumni survey measuring gender attitudes up to 24 years later. Women assigned to female advisors adopt more egalitarian views about politics and work, while men become more conservative. These effects are strongest among religious students and in male-dominated STEM fields, where female authority is especially counter-stereotypical. The effects may persist through reinforcement, as women assigned to female advisors later sort toward female instructors and more gender-themed courses. Our results do not appear to be driven by generic exposure to successful women. Instead, they point to a distinct role for authority in transmitting gender norms: randomized exposure to high-achieving female peers has little effect, while the largest impacts come from senior and high-value-added female advisors. A simple framework combining belief updating and identity-based status threat helps explain these patterns of female empowerment and male backlash. More broadly, our findings reveal a progress paradox whereby gains in female representation in elite authority expand opportunities for women while intensifying backlash among men, thereby deepening gender polarization.
35174.zh_abstract: 本文研究了高等教育中的权威人物如何长期塑造性别规范。我们利用中东一所精英大学一年级学生随机分配至教师导师的情况，并将行政记录与一项衡量性别态度的校友调查（时间跨度长达24年）相结合。被分配给女性导师的女性学生形成了关于政治和工作的更平等主义观点，而男性则变得更加保守。这些效应在宗教学生和男性主导的STEM领域（女性权威尤其反刻板印象）中最为强烈。这些效应可能通过强化而持续，因为被分配给女性导师的女性学生后来会更多地选择女性教师和更多性别主题的课程。我们的结果似乎并非由普遍接触成功女性所驱动。相反，它们指出了权威在传递性别规范中的独特作用：随机接触高成就女性同龄人几乎没有影响，而最大的影响来自资深和高附加值的女性导师。一个结合信念更新和基于身份的地位威胁的简单框架有助于解释这些女性赋权和男性反弹的模式。更广泛地说，我们的发现揭示了一个进步悖论：精英权威中女性代表性的增加在扩大女性机会的同时，也加剧了男性的反弹，从而加深了性别两极分化。
35174.meta: Programs：DEV, ED, LS, POL；JEL：I24, J16, J24, P00, Z12, Z13

35173.title: How does Medicare Eligibility affect Choice and Utilization? Evidence from Veterans
35173.zh_title: 医疗保险资格如何影响选择与利用？来自退伍军人的证据
35173.authors: Marion Aouad, Liam Rose, Todd Wagner
35173.abstract: We examine how Medicare affects health care utilization for those who age in with a more narrow health insurance network by studying veterans enrolled in the Veterans Health Administration (VA). Given the limited geographic density of VA hospitals, we posit that Medicare expands the insurance network for VA enrollees. Using regression discontinuity methods, we find that veterans' inpatient hospitalization rate increases by approximately 3.3 percent at 65. Further, there are large reallocations across health insurance payers. Individuals increasingly use Medicare for hospitalizations once it becomes available, while VA, commercial, and other federal insurance programs are used less. We also find substantial reallocations among individuals that gain access to hospitals closer to their homes and among those who visit the hospital for more postponeable medical procedures. However, we do not find evidence that the average quality rating of the hospital selected at 65 changes nor do we find evidence that VA hospital wait times affect the move to Medicare; rather, individuals choose hospitals that are relatively closer. Lastly, our results suggest that Medicare may compete with other federal programs to provide health care for select populations, such as veterans.
35173.zh_abstract: 我们通过研究加入退伍军人健康管理局（VA）的退伍军人，考察了医疗保险如何影响那些拥有更狭窄健康保险网络的人群的医疗保健利用。鉴于VA医院的地理密度有限，我们假设医疗保险扩大了VA参保者的保险网络。使用断点回归方法，我们发现退伍军人的住院率在65岁时增加了约3.3%。此外，不同健康保险支付方之间存在大规模的重新分配。一旦医疗保险可用，个人越来越多地使用它来支付住院费用，而VA、商业和其他联邦保险计划的使用则减少。我们还发现，在能够获得离家更近的医院的人群中，以及因更可推迟的医疗程序而就医的人群中，存在显著的重新分配。然而，我们没有发现证据表明在65岁时所选医院的平均质量评级发生变化，也没有发现VA医院等待时间影响转向医疗保险的证据；相反，个人选择相对更近的医院。最后，我们的结果表明，医疗保险可能与其他联邦计划竞争，为特定人群（如退伍军人）提供医疗保健。

35172.title: Competitive Exposure and Entrepreneurial Experimentation
35172.abstract: Entrepreneurs learn by experimenting, but experiment choices are often public. A closed beta, private pilot, or public launch not only generates evidence; it also reveals what kind of entrepreneur would choose that action. We develop a dynamic model in which a founder chooses between stealthy and public experiments while potential entrants infer from both actions and outcomes. Public outcomes are modelled as garblings of the founder's private experimental evidence, so public leakage informs outsiders without giving the founder information beyond the private signal already observed. The key state variable is competitive exposure: the public runway before entry becomes attractive. Exposure is depleted by two forces, leakage burn from public outcomes, and action burn from public inference about experiment choice. This distinction implies that competition can distort experiment design without forcing earlier scale: lower-confidence founders choose stealthier tests, while higher-confidence founders spend exposure to obtain faster private learning through more public tests. Scale is accelerated only when exposure reduces the value of waiting more than it reduces the value of scaling. Finally, exogenous funding gates make observable scale more selective and, therefore, more informative to entrants. The analysis shows that entrepreneurial experimentation is not merely private learning under uncertainty; it is public action under competitive inference.
35172.zh_abstract: 企业家通过实验来学习，但实验选择往往是公开的。封闭测试、私人试点或公开发布不仅产生证据；它还揭示了什么样的企业家会选择该行动。我们开发了一个动态模型，其中创始人在隐秘实验和公开实验之间进行选择，而潜在进入者则从行动和结果中进行推断。公开结果被建模为创始人私人实验证据的加噪版本，因此公开泄露告知了外部人士，但并未给创始人提供超出已观察到的私人信号之外的信息。关键状态变量是竞争暴露：即进入变得有吸引力之前的公开跑道。暴露被两种力量消耗：来自公开结果的泄露消耗，以及来自关于实验选择的公开推断的行动消耗。这种区别意味着竞争可以扭曲实验设计而不强制更早的规模化：信心较低的创始人选择更隐秘的测试，而信心较高的创始人则通过更多公开测试消耗暴露以获取更快的私人学习。只有当暴露降低等待价值的幅度大于降低规模化价值的幅度时，规模化才会加速。最后，外生融资门槛使可观察的规模化更具选择性，因此对进入者更具信息量。分析表明，创业实验不仅仅是不确定性下的私人学习；它是在竞争性推断下的公开行动。

35171.title: Labor Market Effects of California’s $20 Fast-Food Minimum Wage
35171.zh_title: 加州20美元快餐最低工资的劳动力市场效应
35171.abstract: California’s AB 1228 raised the minimum wage for large fast-food chains to $\$20$ per hour in April 2024—roughly 77 percent of the state’s median hourly wage, the highest wage floor for fast-food workers in the U.S. Using QCEW data through 2025Q3, I estimate that the policy raised fast-food wages by about 7 percent. A conventional difference-in-differences yields an employment own-wage elasticity (OWE) of −0.19; synthetic difference-in-differences, which reweights controls to match California’s pretreatment trajectory, shrinks the OWE to −0.04. Newly available QWI data through 2024Q4 yield estimates that are on average more positive. Across 32 QCEW and QWI specifications, the OWE ranges from −0.29 to +0.26, bracketing the median OWE of −0.02 I compute across 27 post-2010 state minimum-wage events despite AB 1228’s much larger bite. The QWI also reveals a sharp reduction in the separation rate, with own-wage elasticities of −1.7 to −4.2—several times the restaurant-sector benchmark in Dube et al. (2016) and consistent with a monopsonistic quit-reduction channel. Wage and separation-rate effects concentrate among large employers covered by AB 1228, with limited spillovers. The fall in separations also helps reconcile the somewhat more negative QCEW employment estimates.
35171.zh_abstract: 加利福尼亚州的AB 1228法案于2024年4月将大型快餐连锁店的最低工资提高到每小时20美元——约占该州中位数小时工资的77%，是美国快餐工人最高的工资下限。使用截至2025年第三季度的QCEW数据，我估计该政策使快餐工资提高了约7%。传统的双重差分法得出的就业自身工资弹性（OWE）为-0.19；合成双重差分法（重新加权控制组以匹配加州处理前轨迹）将OWE缩小至-0.04。新获得的截至2024年第四季度的QWI数据得出的估计平均更为正向。在32个QCEW和QWI规格中，OWE的范围从-0.29到+0.26，尽管AB 1228的冲击力度大得多，但该范围包含了我在27个2010年后的州最低工资事件中计算出的中位数OWE（-0.02）。QWI还揭示了离职率的急剧下降，自身工资弹性在-1.7到-4.2之间——是Dube等人（2016）中餐饮业基准的几倍，并且与垄断性离职减少渠道一致。工资和离职率效应集中在受AB 1228覆盖的大型雇主中，溢出效应有限。离职率的下降也有助于调和略显更负面的QCEW就业估计。

35170.title: Extreme Equilibria: The Benefits of Correlation
35170.zh_title: 极端均衡：相关性的益处
35170.authors: Kirill Rudov, Fedor Sandomirskiy, Leeat Yariv
35170.abstract: Correlated equilibria arise naturally when agents communicate or rely on intermediaries such as recommendation systems. We study when a given Nash equilibrium can be improved within the set of correlated equilibria for general objectives. Our key insight is a detail-free criterion: any Nash equilibrium with three or more randomizing agents is generically improvable. We refine this insight to specific classes of games and objectives, including Pareto and utilitarian welfare, and provide constructive methods to obtain improvements. Our findings underscore the ubiquity of improvable Nash equilibria and the crucial role of correlation in enhancing strategic outcomes.
35170.zh_abstract: 当代理人进行沟通或依赖推荐系统等中介时，相关均衡自然会出现。我们研究对于一般目标，何时可以在相关均衡集合内改进给定的纳什均衡。我们的关键见解是一个无需细节的标准：任何具有三个或更多随机化代理人的纳什均衡在一般情况下都是可改进的。我们将这一见解细化到特定类别的博弈和目标，包括帕累托和功利主义福利，并提供了获得改进的构造性方法。我们的发现强调了可改进纳什均衡的普遍性以及相关性在增强战略结果中的关键作用。

35169.title: Opt In? Opt Out?
35169.authors: Alex Chan, Ayush Gupta, Yetong Xu
35169.abstract: Cadaveric organ shortages leave thousands without life-saving transplants each year. Countries differ in using opt-in (informed consent) or opt-out (presumed consent) systems for donor registration. Using newly assembled cross-country panel data and an event-study design, this paper provides evidence that presumed-consent laws increase organ donation only when strictly enforced and family veto power is limited; weak opt-out regimes show negligible or even negative effects. A theoretical signaling model provides a plausible mechanism when opt-in or opt-out yields more donations, emphasizing the roles of donation propensity, signaling costs, and the family’s ability to overturn defaults. A large laboratory experiment further tests these mechanisms, showing that opt-in generally produces equal or higher donation rates unless signaling is costly and family veto power is minimal. The results underscore that defaults alone rarely increase donations unless paired with strong institutional enforcement.
35169.zh_abstract: 遗体器官短缺每年导致数千人无法获得挽救生命的移植。各国在器官捐献登记中采用选择加入（知情同意）或选择退出（推定同意）制度。本文利用新构建的跨国面板数据和事件研究设计，提供证据表明：推定同意法律仅在严格执法且家庭否决权受限时才能增加器官捐献；宽松的选择退出制度效果微乎其微，甚至产生负面影响。一个理论信号模型解释了选择加入或选择退出何时能带来更多捐献的合理机制，强调了捐献倾向、信号成本以及家庭推翻默认选择的能力。一项大型实验室实验进一步检验了这些机制，结果表明：除非信号成本高昂且家庭否决权极小，否则选择加入通常能产生相等或更高的捐献率。研究结果强调，除非与强有力的制度执行相结合，否则仅靠默认选择很少能增加捐献。
35169.meta: Programs：EH, LE, PE；JEL：C91, C92, D47, D64, H00, I11, I18

35168.title: The Postpandemic U.S. Immigration Surge: New Facts and Inflationary Implications
35168.zh_title: 后疫情时代的美国移民潮：新事实与通胀影响
35168.authors: Anton Cheremukhin, Sewon Hur, Ronald R. Mau, Karel Mertens, Alexander W. Richter, Xiaoqing Zhou
35168.abstract: The U.S. experienced an extraordinary surge in immigration from 2021 to 2024, which triggered widespread discussions about its macroeconomic impact, particularly on inflation. To determine the impact of the immigration surge, we first document the salient features of these new immigrants: they are primarily low-skilled relative to the existing workforce and more likely to be hand-to-mouth consumers. We then incorporate these features into a heterogeneous agent model with capital-skill complementarity. We find that the supply- and demand-side effects of the immigration surge roughly cancel out, causing a negligible response of inflation.
35168.zh_abstract: 美国在2021年至2024年间经历了异常庞大的移民潮，引发了关于其宏观经济影响（尤其是对通胀影响）的广泛讨论。为确定移民潮的影响，我们首先记录了这些新移民的显著特征：相对于现有劳动力，他们主要是低技能者，且更可能是月光族消费者。随后，我们将这些特征纳入一个具有资本-技能互补性的异质性主体模型中。我们发现，移民潮的供给和需求效应大致相互抵消，导致通胀反应微乎其微。
35168.meta: Programs：ME；JEL：E21, E22, E31, F22, J11, J15

35167.title: On the Negative Consequences of Low-Wage Offshoring for Innovation
35167.zh_title: 低工资离岸外包对创新的负面影响
35167.authors: Wulong Gu, Alla Lileeva, Daniel Trefler
35167.abstract: Conventional wisdom holds that offshoring intermediates to China stimulates innovation. This is not entirely compelling. On the one hand, (a) offshoring lowers marginal costs and expands sales, thereby increasing the returns to innovation, especially for large firms. On the other hand, (b) offshoring low-quality intermediates reduces the costs of older-generation products, thereby reducing the returns to innovating into newer generations. We examine these two opposing forces over 2002-2011 for 6,024 Canadian firms. Our empirical strategy regresses measures of innovation, such as R&D, on imports of intermediate inputs. To address endogeneity, we construct a model-consistent shift-share instrument whose shocks are the often-dramatic improvements in the quality of HS6 Chinese intermediate inputs. We find that greater offshoring reduced R&D spending over 2002-2011 by 15% as (1) firms engaged in R&D in 2002 reduced their expenditures, and (2) firms not initially engaged in R&D were discouraged from starting up new R&D projects. Our model explains these findings: Rising quality of Chinese intermediates is a positive supply shock (rather than a negative China shock) that raises profits for all offshorers, raises innovation for the largest offshorers (channel a above), and lowers innovation for all other offshorers (channel b). These predictions are confirmed in the data.
35167.zh_abstract: 传统观点认为，将中间品离岸外包到中国会刺激创新。但这并非完全令人信服。一方面，(a)离岸外包降低了边际成本并扩大了销售，从而增加了创新的回报，尤其对大型企业而言。另一方面，(b)离岸外包低质量的中间品降低了老一代产品的成本，从而降低了创新进入新一代产品的回报。我们考察了2002-2011年间这些对立力量对6024家加拿大企业的影响。我们的实证策略是将创新指标（如研发支出）对中间品进口进行回归。为解决内生性问题，我们构建了一个与模型一致的转移份额工具变量，其冲击来自中国HS6中间品质量通常显著的提升。我们发现，更多的离岸外包使2002-2011年间的研发支出减少了15%，原因是：(1) 2002年从事研发的企业减少了支出，以及(2) 最初未从事研发的企业被抑制，不再启动新的研发项目。我们的模型解释了这些发现：中国中间品质量的提升是一个正向供给冲击（而非负向中国冲击），它提高了所有离岸外包企业的利润，提高了最大离岸外包企业的创新（上述渠道a），并降低了所有其他离岸外包企业的创新（渠道b）。这些预测在数据中得到了证实。

35166.title: Interest Rate Caps, Competition, and Strategic Borrowing: Evidence from Kenya
35166.zh_title: 利率上限、竞争与策略性借贷：来自肯尼亚的证据
35166.authors: Aroon Narayanan, Tavneet Suri, Prashant Bharadwaj
35166.abstract: We study Kenya’s 2016 interest-rate regulation, which capped bank lending rates but left one digital platform, called M-Shwari, exempt on the lending side while imposing a deposit-rate floor across all lenders in the market. Using borrower-level administrative data, survey data, and an RD around the implementation date, we show three main results. First, lending on the exempt platform rose, but with the safest borrowers substituting away toward cheaper capped credit. Second, riskier borrowers increase their savings to build up their credit limits. Third, on the supply side, M-Shwari raises the limits for the safest borrowers in an attempt to retain them. We build and estimate a simple model of screening and credit limit-setting to interpret these reallocations and compute welfare. The observed carve-out for M-Shwari preserves access for high-risk borrowers but yields a slight aggregate welfare decline relative to pre-policy. However, a uniform (across all lenders) interest rate cap counterfactual generates substantially larger welfare losses by entirely eliminating credit for high-risk borrowers.
35166.zh_abstract: 我们研究了肯尼亚2016年的利率监管，该监管设定了银行贷款利率上限，但豁免了一个名为M-Shwari的数字平台在贷款端的限制，同时对市场上所有贷款机构设定了存款利率下限。利用借款人层面的行政数据、调查数据以及围绕实施日期的断点回归，我们展示了三个主要结果。首先，被豁免平台上的贷款增加了，但最安全的借款人转向更便宜的受上限约束的信贷。其次，风险较高的借款人增加储蓄以提高其信用额度。第三，在供给方面，M-Shwari提高了最安全借款人的额度以试图留住他们。我们构建并估计了一个简单的筛选和信用额度设定模型来解释这些重新配置并计算福利。观察到的对M-Shwari的豁免保留了高风险借款人的信贷获取，但与政策前相比，总体福利略有下降。然而，一个统一的（适用于所有贷款机构）利率上限反事实情景，通过完全消除高风险借款人的信贷，产生了更大的福利损失。

35165.title: Health Inequalities Among Danish Retirees 2004-2022
35165.zh_title: 2004-2022年丹麦退休人员的健康不平等
35165.authors: Paul Bingley, Nabanita Datta Gupta, Malene Kallestrup-Lamb, Alexander O.K. Marin
35165.abstract: Using Danish SHARE data from 2004–2022, we examine income gradients in health among retirees ages 60–79 across functional, diagnosed, comprehensive, mental, and cognitive domains. Higher-income retirees are healthier across all dimensions, but the evolution of inequality differs across measures. Functional and comprehensive health gaps narrow over time because lower-income retirees improve, whereas mental health gaps remain large and persistent. Diagnosed and cognitive health show smaller, less stable gradients. Overall, health inequality at older ages is substantial but not uniform: physical health disparities compress, while mental health disparities show no sign of convergence.
35165.zh_abstract: 利用2004-2022年的丹麦SHARE数据，我们考察了60-79岁退休人员在功能、诊断、综合、心理和认知健康领域的收入梯度。高收入退休人员在所有维度上都更健康，但不平等的演变因衡量指标而异。功能健康和综合健康的差距随时间缩小，因为低收入退休人员有所改善，而心理健康差距仍然很大且持续存在。诊断健康和认知健康的梯度较小且不稳定。总体而言，老年时期的健康不平等是显著的，但并不统一：身体健康差距在缩小，而心理健康差距没有收敛的迹象。

35164.title: How Should Central Banks Respond to Commodity Price Shocks? Optimal Monetary and Exchange Rate Frameworks for Commodity-Exposed Economies
35164.zh_title: 中央银行应如何应对大宗商品价格冲击？大宗商品暴露经济体的最优货币与汇率框架
35164.authors: Thomas Drechsel, Michael McLeay, Silvana Tenreyro, Enrico D. Turri
35164.abstract: We show that the optimal monetary policy and exchange rate framework depend critically on the economy’s commodity exposure. We develop a flexible but tractable model economy with commodity exports and imports, in which international financial conditions may vary with the commodity cycle, and we compute the welfare-optimal policy in the presence of price and wage rigidities. Stabilizing domestic prices is welfare-optimal for commodity exporters, in line with standard open-economy policy prescriptions. But for economies that use commodities as inputs in production, optimal policy largely ‘looks through’ the direct and indirect effects of commodity shocks on domestic prices; this contrasts with some earlier findings and policy practice (which only ‘looks through’ the direct effect). Exchange-rate pegs increase welfare for commodity importers because they stabilize wages and employment, though it is not a robustly optimal policy. In emerging and developing economies, where financial conditions are more tied to the commodity cycle, trade-offs are starker and implementing the optimal policy may be challenging, since it requires enough credibility to keep inflation expectations anchored amidst greater volatility in some nominal variables.
35164.zh_abstract: 我们表明，最优货币政策和汇率框架关键取决于经济体的大宗商品暴露程度。我们开发了一个灵活但易于处理的经济模型，包含大宗商品出口和进口，其中国际金融条件可能随大宗商品周期而变化，并在存在价格和工资刚性的情况下计算福利最优政策。对于大宗商品出口国而言，稳定国内价格是福利最优的，这与标准的开放经济政策处方一致。但对于将大宗商品用作生产投入的经济体，最优政策在很大程度上“看穿”了大宗商品冲击对国内价格的直接和间接影响；这与先前的一些发现和政策实践（仅“看穿”直接影响）形成对比。汇率盯住制增加了大宗商品进口国的福利，因为它稳定了工资和就业，尽管这并非一个稳健的最优政策。在新兴和发展中经济体，金融条件与大宗商品周期的联系更为紧密，权衡取舍更为严峻，实施最优政策可能具有挑战性，因为这需要足够的可信度来在部分名义变量波动性加大的情况下锚定通胀预期。

35199.title: How do Workers Learn? Theory and Evidence on the Roots of Lifecycle Human Capital Accumulation
35199.zh_title: 工人如何学习？生命周期人力资本积累根源的理论与证据
35199.authors: Xiao Ma, Alejandro Nakab, Daniela Vidart
35199.abstract: How do the sources of worker learning change over the lifecycle, and how does this affect human capital and wages? Using data from Germany and the US, we document that internal learning (from coworkers) decreases with experience, while external learning (on-the-job training) follows an inverted U-shape. We develop a search model featuring multiple learning sources whose returns evolve as workers age and accumulate human capital. Quantitative results indicate that the interaction between sources is key to lifecycle wage dynamics and the effects of remote work, which disrupts internal learning and early-career wage growth, though external learning partially offsets these losses.
35199.zh_abstract: 工人学习的来源如何随生命周期变化，这又如何影响人力资本和工资？利用德国和美国的数据，我们记录了内部学习（来自同事）随经验增加而减少，而外部学习（在职培训）则呈倒U型。我们构建了一个包含多种学习来源的搜索模型，这些来源的回报会随着工人年龄增长和人力资本积累而演变。定量结果表明，来源之间的相互作用是生命周期工资动态以及远程工作影响的关键，远程工作会破坏内部学习和早期职业工资增长，尽管外部学习部分抵消了这些损失。

35198.title: The Effects of GLP-1 Use on Mental Health, Self-rated Health, Employment and Marriage
35198.zh_title: GLP-1药物使用对心理健康、自评健康、就业和婚姻的影响
35198.abstract: In this article, we exploit the recent, rapid diffusion of the use of GLP-1 drugs among individuals with diabetes to measure the effect of the use of these drugs on mental health, self-rated health, employment, and marriage. The documented large weight loss from GLP-1 use may plausibly affect these outcomes and evidence of these broader impacts of GLP-1 use is necessary to evaluate their full value. Estimates are obtained using a longitudinal (within-person) regression approach. Results indicate that GLP-1 use is not meaningfully associated with mental health, self-rated health, employment, and marriage. Overall, our analysis adds new evidence about how GLP-1 use is affecting the lives of individuals with diabetes.
35198.zh_abstract: 在本文中，我们利用GLP-1药物在糖尿病患者中近期快速普及的现象，来衡量使用这些药物对心理健康、自评健康、就业和婚姻的影响。GLP-1使用所导致的显著体重减轻可能会影响这些结果，而评估GLP-1使用的这些更广泛影响的证据对于评估其全部价值是必要的。我们使用纵向（个体内）回归方法获得估计值。结果表明，GLP-1使用与心理健康、自评健康、就业和婚姻没有显著关联。总体而言，我们的分析为GLP-1使用如何影响糖尿病患者的生活增添了新的证据。

35197.title: Global Policy Spillovers: How Environmental Policies Propagate through Product Attributes
35197.zh_title: 全球政策溢出效应：环境政策如何通过产品属性传播
35197.authors: Koichiro Ito, James M. Sallee, Caleb Halvorson-Fried, Andrew Smith
35197.abstract: How should policymakers evaluate policy impacts when firms design products for global markets? Standard economic analyses typically focus on domestic outcomes, implicitly assuming that policies affect only the jurisdiction in which they are enacted. Yet multinational firms often harmonize product design across markets, creating the potential for policies implemented in one country to generate global spillovers through changes in product attributes. We call this phenomenon "attribute propagation" and develop a framework to measure and assess its quantitative importance. Applying this framework to an environmental policy affecting automobiles, we find that a fuel-economy subsidy in Japan led to significant improvements in the fuel economy of vehicles sold in the United States. We then develop a model of multinational automobile markets featuring cross-market cost complementarity as a key mechanism driving attribute propagation. Using the estimated model, we conduct counterfactual simulations to quantify environmental benefits accounting for the policy’s global spillover effects. We find that global spillover effects are first-order—a majority of the CO2 emissions reductions induced by the Japanese policy arise through its impact on the U.S. automobile market. These findings suggest that standard economic analyses that abstract from attribute propagation can substantially understate the full policy impact. More broadly, attribute propagation provides a new lens for evaluating environmental, safety, antitrust, and technology policies in a global economy.
35197.zh_abstract: 当企业为全球市场设计产品时，政策制定者应如何评估政策影响？标准的经济分析通常侧重于国内结果，隐含地假设政策仅影响其实施的司法管辖区。然而，跨国公司通常会在不同市场间协调产品设计，这导致一国实施的政策可能通过产品属性的变化产生全球溢出效应。我们将这种现象称为“属性传播”，并构建了一个框架来衡量和评估其定量重要性。将该框架应用于一项影响汽车的环境政策，我们发现日本的燃油经济性补贴显著改善了在美国销售的车辆的燃油经济性。随后，我们构建了一个以跨市场成本互补性作为驱动属性传播关键机制的跨国汽车市场模型。利用估计的模型，我们进行了反事实模拟，以量化考虑政策全球溢出效应后的环境效益。我们发现全球溢出效应是一阶重要的——日本政策所导致的二氧化碳减排量大部分是通过其对美国汽车市场的影响实现的。这些发现表明，忽略属性传播的标准经济分析可能会严重低估政策的全部影响。更广泛地说，属性传播为评估全球经济中的环境、安全、反垄断和技术政策提供了新的视角。
35197.meta: Programs：EEE, IO, PR；JEL：L0, Q4, Q5, R4

35196.title: Making Sense of Labor Market Indicators Amid Data Imperfections
35196.zh_title: 在数据不完美中解读劳动力市场指标
35196.authors: Scott A. Brave, Erin E. Crust, Stefano Eusepi, Bart Hobijn, Ayşegül Şahin
35196.abstract: Interpreting real-time labor market conditions is challenging because commonly used indicators are noisy, revised over time, and often send conflicting signals. In practice, policymakers and market participants describe labor market developments using a shared narrative language centered on labor demand, labor supply, and matching frictions. In this paper, we show that empirical measures of these narrative concepts can be recovered from latent factors that summarize the joint movements of a broad set of high-frequency U.S. labor-market indicators. We use ninety-four labor-market indicators, over the period from 1960 to 2026, and construct measures for labor demand, long-run labor supply, short-run labor supply, and matching efficiency by selecting the factors that satisfy a limited set of restrictions on how underlying forces map into observed data. We find that labor demand and short-run labor supply account for most of the common variation in labor-market indicators. Our results also show that assigning narrow interpretations to individual indicators can lead to misleading conclusions about underlying labor market conditions. Applying the framework to the post-pandemic period reveals that although labor demand recovered briskly after the acute phase of the pandemic, it cannot account for the large rise in vacancies and quits. Instead, movements in short-run labor supply and matching efficiency play a central role. We also show that the “soft-landing” episode from 2023 through 2025 was characterized by a joint decline in labor demand and short-run labor supply, which slowed payroll growth while generating only a moderate increase in the unemployment rate.
35196.zh_abstract: 解读实时劳动力市场状况颇具挑战性，因为常用指标存在噪音、会随时间修正，且常常发出相互矛盾的信号。在实践中，政策制定者和市场参与者使用围绕劳动力需求、劳动力供给和匹配摩擦的共同叙事语言来描述劳动力市场发展。在本文中，我们表明这些叙事概念的经验度量可以从总结美国大量高频劳动力市场指标共同变动的潜在因子中恢复。我们使用1960年至2026年期间的94个劳动力市场指标，通过选择满足一组关于潜在力量如何映射到观测数据的有限限制的因子，构建了劳动力需求、长期劳动力供给、短期劳动力供给和匹配效率的度量。我们发现劳动力需求和短期劳动力供给解释了劳动力市场指标中大部分的共同变动。我们的结果还表明，对单个指标进行狭隘解读可能导致对潜在劳动力市场状况的误导性结论。将该框架应用于疫情后时期，发现尽管劳动力需求在疫情急性期后迅速恢复，但它无法解释职位空缺和离职率的大幅上升。相反，短期劳动力供给和匹配效率的变动起着核心作用。我们还表明，2023年至2025年的“软着陆”阶段的特点是劳动力需求和短期劳动力供给同时下降，这减缓了薪资增长，同时仅导致失业率温和上升。
35196.meta: Programs：EFG, ME；JEL：C32, C38, E24, E32, E58

35195.title: AlphaPortfolio: Goal-Oriented Investment Management Through Deep Reinforcement Learning
35195.zh_title: AlphaPortfolio：通过深度强化学习实现目标导向的投资管理
35195.authors: Lin William Cong, Ke Tang, Jingyuan Wang
35195.abstract: We adapt attention-based neural networks and reinforcement learning to direct portfolio construction, allowing broader portfolio-management objectives (including non-time-additively separable ones) and in a data-driven way, searching over a much richer policy/strategy space than low-dimensional parametric rules or human-specified strategies. As arguably the first non-text-based, “large” GenAI model in Finance, AlphaPortfolio accommodates long- and short-range path dependence in firm and market states (e.g., using Transformer encoder), cross-asset information, flexible (path-dependent) objectives (incl. Sharpe ratio, which is non-additively separable across periods) for end-to-end (rather than step-by-step) optimizations. In U.S. equities, AlphaPortfolio yields superior out-of-sample performance (e.g., Sharpe ratio above two and risk-adjusted alpha over 13% with monthly rebalancing) robust under various market conditions and economic restrictions (e.g., exclusion of small/illiquid stocks) and over time. The gains come from the direct construction, effective sequence modeling, and cross-asset attention network. We further demonstrate AlphaPortfolio's flexibility to incorporate transaction costs, state interactions, and alternative objectives, before developing a polynomial-feature-sensitivity analysis to uncover key drivers of performance, including their rotation and nonlinearity.
35195.zh_abstract: 我们采用基于注意力的神经网络和强化学习来指导投资组合构建，允许更广泛的投资组合管理目标（包括非时间可加可分的目标），并以数据驱动的方式，在比低维参数规则或人为指定策略更丰富的策略/策略空间中进行搜索。作为金融领域可以说是第一个非文本基础的“大型”生成式AI模型，AlphaPortfolio能够处理公司和市场状态中的长期和短期路径依赖性（例如，使用Transformer编码器）、跨资产信息以及灵活（路径依赖的）目标（包括夏普比率，它在各期间不可加可分），以实现端到端（而非逐步）优化。在美国股票中，AlphaPortfolio产生了卓越的样本外表现（例如，月度再平衡下夏普比率超过2，风险调整后阿尔法超过13%），在各种市场条件和经济限制（例如，排除小盘股/非流动性股票）下以及随时间推移都表现稳健。收益来自直接构建、有效的序列建模和跨资产注意力网络。我们进一步展示了AlphaPortfolio在纳入交易成本、状态交互和替代目标方面的灵活性，随后开发了一种多项式特征敏感性分析，以揭示绩效的关键驱动因素，包括其轮动和非线性。
